CFP_ShipWaveAttack_ClearHostiles_Desc_E_.en:
To help protect our pilots, Citizens for Prosperity will often recommend the use of less traditional routes through the system. However, it seems that a gang of outlaws has gotten word and has begun to stage repeated ambushes along one such flightpath. Rather than just go around the problem and risk it persisting along the new route, we feel it we be prudent to meet these outlaws head on.

You and whatever support ships you enlist will head to [LOCATION] and neutralize any hostiles you find laying in wait there. They have been known to operate in smaller packs, so it's vital that you wait until all of the hostiles have been dealt with.

Your assistance is much appreciated,
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

headhunters_sabotage_servers_E_CFP_desc_.en:
Long story, short - a Headhunter messed up real bad and now Citizens for Prosperity has gotten their hands on some data that could really do some damage to us. 

The bastard is going to need some time to heal so that leaves it to you to clean up the mess. Can you go to [LOCATION] and destroy the servers they got stored there? I wanna make sure there's no chance of this info getting out there.

-Stows out

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A longtime client needs combat support at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> as fast as we can get it there. Any chance you’re interested and available?

EckhartSecurity_RecoverCargo_Easy_Descri.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Recover Cargo
Approval code: = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

RAIN_CollectResources_storm_desc_001.en:
To all available contractors,

We at Rayari are dedicating all our energy to stopping the regeneration technology crisis in its tracks, but for our scientists to continue their efforts they need resources that the company's suppliers have been unable to deliver. 

There is a sizeable population of kopions that have been exposed to radiation near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Rayari is seeking an contractor to collect <EM4>irradiated kopion horns</EM4> and deliver them to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Due to the scarcity of this resource, we are prepared to pay a high service fee. 

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing

RAIN_CollectResources_storm_desc_004.en:
To all available contractors,

We at Rayari are working day and night to solve the current regen crisis, but to continue their efforts our scientists need rare resources that the company's suppliers cannot deliver. 

We are therefore seeking a contractor to secure an <EM4>irradiated valakkar egg</EM4>. Our scans have confirmed several radioactive storms with known a valakkar presence on Pyro I, you can find a shuttle near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> that will take you inside the storm. One more thing, analysis indicates that these eggs will decay over time, the state of the egg shouldn't affect our research but sooner would be better.

Due to the health risks associated with radiation exposure that will be needed to deliver a viable sample, Rayari is ready to pay well for anyone who can safely secure and deliver this item.

Once attained, please take this valuable resource to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing

GFS_ShipWaveAttack_Mission01_Desc.en:
Looking to gain critical hands-on experience battling a variety of targets and situations? Then my Combat Gauntlet might be the perfect fit for you.

Please understand that this course is intended for pilots who have already mastered flying basics and are ready to take their abilities to the next level. If you’re starting off and want to learn the ropes, I’d recommend logging some hours in an Arena Commander simpod. But for those ready to face a real challenge, I firmly believe that students learn best by doing. 

That’s why I’ve designed these eight scenarios to be as realistic as possible. I promise you this is the closest thing to Navy combat pilot training you can get without enlisting, so don’t expect a lot of hand holding. <EM4>The risk of injury to yourself or your ship should be taken very seriously.</EM4>

GAUNTLET SCENARIOS:
1. Single Targets
2. Multiple Targets
3. Target Priority
4. Target Stealth
5. Missiles and Countermeasures
6. Multi-Crew Targets
7. Corvette with Escorts
8. Capital Ship Encounter

So, if you’re ready to challenge yourself and prove you got what it takes to be a great pilot, the first scenario will focus on handling a single target. Head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to begin.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>1 MG Scrip</EM4>.

TRICKS OF THE TRADE:
- Situational Awareness – Don’t get so focused on taking a target that you aren’t watching your flight path. No good taking out the enemy if you fly headfirst into an asteroid.

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly    

ABOUT GILLY’S FLIGHT SCHOOL 
Instructor Lucas “Gilly” Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to “Launch Your Piloting Career.”

GFS_ShipWaveAttack_Mission02_Desc.en:
Congrats on completing part one of this eight-part course.

Scenario two will focus on how to deal with multiple targets at the same time. Goal here is give you a better handle on how to balance offense and defense.   

Whenever you’re set, grab a combat ship, and head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to begin.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>3 MG Scrip</EM4>.

TRICKS OF THE TRADE:
- Pick Your Fight - For situations where you’re coming up against multiple targets of equal threat, your best strategy is to focus on neutralizing one target at a time to gradually reduce the amount of incoming fire.

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly     

ABOUT GILLY’S FLIGHT SCHOOL  
Instructor Lucas “Gilly” Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to “Launch Your Piloting Career.”

GFS_ShipWaveAttack_Mission03_Desc.en:
Congrats on completing part two of this eight-part course.   

The third scenario throws tactical considerations into the mix. This time around the attacking ships are from distinct classes with distinct battlefield applications. Knowing what targets to prioritize is vital to surviving engagements against multiple ships.      

Whenever you’re ready, head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to get started.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>5 MG Scrip</EM4>.

TRICKS OF THE TRADE:
- Bigger They Are – Try to evaluate which threat is the most dangerous and take them out first.
- Shields – If you’re taking a lot of damage, don’t be afraid to boost away and let your shields regenerate.

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly     

ABOUT GILLY’S FLIGHT SCHOOL  
Instructor Lucas “Gilly” Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to “Launch Your Piloting Career.”

GFS_ShipWaveAttack_Mission04_Desc.en:
Congrats on completing part three of this eight-part course.

Good combat pilots know not all threats are apparent. It’s the threats you don’t expect that can be the most devastating. Scenario four is focused on how to identify and deal with stealth targets. Hopefully by the end, you’ll understand just how important your radar is in determining who you’re really up against. Expect to have regular and stealth ships hunting you down.    

Make your way to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> whenever you’re ready, and remember to keep your eyes on your radar.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>10 MG Scrip</EM4>.

TRICKS OF THE TRADE:
- Surprise Attacks - Pinging your surroundings can sometimes reveal hidden ships. Be ready for contacts to show up unexpectedly.

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly     

ABOUT GILLY’S FLIGHT SCHOOL  
Instructor Lucas “Gilly” Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to “Launch Your Piloting Career.”

GFS_ShipWaveAttack_Mission05_Desc.en:
Congrats on completing part four of this eight-part course.   

The fifth scenario focuses on defensive tactics. Knowing when to take evasive measures and deploy either decoys or noise countermeasures is essential to your survival. That’s why the aggressors in this exercise will be armed with missiles.   

Ensure your countermeasures are fully stocked and then go to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to start.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>12 MG Scrip</EM4>.

TRICKS OF THE TRADE:
- Ready to Launch - Easy access to your decoys and countermeasures can be critical in your success in dealing with incoming missile fire. 
- Stand and Fight - Resist the temptation to hit the afterburner to escape as you’ll increase your signature and make it easier for the missile to hit you. They’re almost certainly much faster than you anyway.
- Close the Gap – While it may seem counterintuitive, getting closer to an enemy ship can be an advantage. Missiles have a minimum range and if you’re inside of it they won’t be able to get a lock on you.

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly     

ABOUT GILLY’S FLIGHT SCHOOL  
Instructor Lucas “Gilly” Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to “Launch Your Piloting Career.”

GFS_ShipWaveAttack_Mission06_Desc.en:
Congrats on completing part five of this eight-part course.

I’m bringing out the big guns for scenario six. Time for you to go up against larger, multi-crewed ships, which provide a few new challenges. Not only will you have to contend with their enhanced firepower but their multifaceted shields means you’ll have to target one shield face continually to do real damage. Easier said than done when both of y’all are moving at such fast speeds.      

Find your way to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> whenever you're ready.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>14 MG Scrip</EM4>. 

TRICKS OF THE TRADE:
- Size Advantage – When going up against a larger ship, try to stay away from their front as typically this is where the majority of their offensive fire is located. 

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly     

ABOUT GILLY’S FLIGHT SCHOOL   
Instructor Lucas “Gilly” Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to “Launch Your Piloting Career.”

GFS_ShipWaveAttack_Mission07_Desc.en:
Congrats on completing part six of this eight-part course.

You’ve gained a lot of experience across the past six scenarios, and now it’s time to put it all to practice. Scenario seven puts you up against a corvette-class ship and its escorts. This extended encounter will push you to the limit and test everything you got.   

The only thing left is to understand the limit of your skillset. To put it simply, you can’t do everything yourself. Developing and maintaining relationships with fellow pilots that you can call upon for support is really the last piece of the puzzle. Not saying you can't overcome encounters like this by yourself, but even the Navy doesn’t send their ace pilots on a patrol alone.    

Once you decided whether to do this alone or call in some support, head over to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to kick off the encounter.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>16 MG Scrip</EM4>.

TRICKS OF THE TRADE
- Strength in Diversity – Think about the roles your allies will be filling and choose who to bring carefully to help balance strengths and weaknesses. You’ll want ships capable of taking on the Corvette while others deal with the escort.

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly     

ABOUT GILLY’S FLIGHT SCHOOL   
Instructor Lucas “Gilly” Baramsco has served in six squadrons and has over ten years of teaching experience. Whether a student with zero flight experience or a professional looking to polish their skills, Gilly Flight School offers a variety of courses to “Launch Your Piloting Career.”

GFS_ShipWaveAttack_Mission08_Desc.en:
Welcome to the final scenario of the Combat Gauntlet.

Throughout this course, you’ve gotten to experience the advanced combat and defensive tactics needed to survive a variety of encounters. Time to take all those new skills and knowledge and see how they hold up against a large capital vessel and some escort ships.

You know the drill by now. Once you and all your allies are set, find your way to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to see how you do when truly pushed to the limits.

As a bonus, successful completion of the scenario will net the original contractor holder an award of <EM4>20 MG Scrip</EM4>.

TRICKS OF THE TRADE
- Patience is a Virtue – If you’ve balanced your squadron properly, you should be able to come out on top, just don’t expect it to be a quick fight. Ships this big don’t go down quickly.

Good luck out there, 
Instructor Gilly

cfp_defendship_multi_SRT_desc_001.en:
I’m getting reports that a Citizens for Prosperity convoy carrying vital supplies is currently under attack at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. It’d be a big blow to our operations if we lost that cargo. 

If you’ve got the combat skills to go up against highly aggressive hostiles, we’re more than willing to pay for your help. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

LingFamily_RecoverCargo_Hard_Description.en:
Hello,

Some sad news. Unfortunately our hauler ran into some trouble and had to abandoned the cargo they were due to deliver. We haven't heard anything back from them so we're assuming the worse.

We're in the process of contacting their family and are conscious this is a very sensitive time, but also can't afford to leave a job incomplete. Our trackers show the cargo is still intact over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.

If you could finish the delivery we would be really grateful. We're not picking up on any nearby ships so it should be safe for you to collect. Bring a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and a ship that can carry <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4>.

Deliver the cargo to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and we'll take care of the rest.

Thanks,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator 
Ling Family Hauling 

Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.

We're in the process of contacting their family and are conscious this is a very sensitive time, but also can't afford to leave a job incomplete. Our trackers show the cargo is still intact over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.

If you could finish the delivery we would be really grateful. We're not picking up on any nearby ships so it should be safe for you to collect. Bring a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and a ship that can carry <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4>.

Deliver the cargo to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and we'll take care of the rest.

Thanks,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator 
Ling Family 貨運 

Ling Family 貨運 knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.

headhunters_bombingrun_killship_M_desc_0.en:
Everyone has been talking about a new player named [TARGET] who is operating out of [LOCATION]. They've become a real concern for the Headhunters. 

It's time to shut them down. 

Head over, take out [TARGET] and then clear out any fuel stores they have there to convince anyone remaining to leave. 

Figure after you pull this off, nobody will even remember their name.

-Stows

cfp_defendship_multi_HRT_desc_001.en:
We just received word that a convoy of Citizen for Prosperity affiliated ships have been targeted by outlaws and that our people are in dire need of assistance. 

If you are available, we need combat ready pilots at [LOCATION] to defend our people. Note that at this dire time, we cannot afford even a single lost ship and expect with your assistance for all of our people make it out alive.

Good luck,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

cfp_defendship_multi_VHRT_SB_desc_001.en:
We’ve lost contact with a supply convoy and are concerned it might be under attack. Last comm we received from them reported Shattered Blade ships were incoming, but haven’t heard anything since. Are you free to hurry to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and support our forces? 

We’ve come to learn that the Shattered Blade are very protective of their hunting grounds. Our last few encounters with them were quite intense, so I’d recommend bringing some heavy firepower.   

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

A contractor of ours has run into some trouble and abandoned their ship over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. We need someone to head to their ship, pick up the package they left there, and finish the job.

PACKAGES TO RECOVER
     · <EM4>1x [ITEM1]</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Deliver to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>

We’re currently uncertain as to why they failed to complete the contract, so be cautious when approaching the ship.

TAKE PRIDE IN YOUR WORK – Even as a contractor you are representing Red Wind Linehaul. Do not intentionally do anything to harm the company’s reputation.

spacecollect_cargo_desc_VH_01.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

We appreciate how hard you’ve been working for us recently, which is why we’d like to offer you this advanced contract. An important client of ours is waiting for delivery on multiple packages but the courier due to deliver them is no longer responding. The package trackers are showing that they’re at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, meaning we have some time to recover the delivery.

PACKAGES TO RECOVER
     · <EM4>5x [ITEM1]</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Deliver to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>

We cannot stress enough how important the success of this delivery is. Since we do not know what happened to the original courier, we strongly urge you to travel with <EM4>several trustworthy combat pilots.</EM4>

Needless to say, we’re offering a substantial payout for this one proportionate to the danger of the contract.

TAKE PRIDE IN YOUR WORK – Even as a contractor you are representing Red Wind Linehaul. Do not intentionally do anything to harm the company’s reputation.

deadsaints_recoveritem_VH_Desc_001.en:
I got a situation I need dealing with pronto. A rival crew has intercepted a major shipment of gear I was expecting and all hell is breaking loose. The pilot’s ghosted, the ship’s busted, and it’s only a matter of time before they take my shit and leave. If you’re up for cracking these assholes, head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and get my five packages.

Head’s up though, the pilot they ghosted was one of my best, so this crew’s got to be seriously kitted out. Bring your finest mates with you and show the bastards no mercy. Understood?

When you’re done, take the gear to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and I’ll make sure you get a serious cut of the takings.

-Twitch

A couple of hours ago I was supposed to receive a shipment of gear from a pilot of mine. I don’t like late, so I need you to head to their location and recover my stuff. I’ve got trackers on the packages so they should be easy enough to find.

My gut says the pilot’s been ghosted. They knew how to handle a ship well, so the scavs that took them out must be decent. When you get my three packages back, take them to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> for me and I’ll wire you the creds.

-Twitch

You’ll potentially need to <EM4>bring some backup</EM4> with you to ensure the successful collection and delivery of the packages.

PACKAGES TO RECOVER
     · <EM4>4x [ITEM1]</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Deliver to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>

Considering the danger of this contract, we’re willing to offer a slight pay increase as hazard pay.

TAKE PRIDE IN YOUR WORK – Even as a contractor you are representing Red Wind Linehaul. Do not intentionally do anything to harm the company’s reputation.

deadsaints_recoveritem_H_Desc_001.en:
Just got a comm from the pilot who was transporting some gear for me and it sounded like they got jumped while on the call. I need someone to head to their location, grab the four packages that are still left inside their ship and bring them back to me.

Before they cut out, they told me that the ships that attacked them weren’t your standard transporters. These assholes are rocking some serious weaponry. Bring a crew, get my shit, and take it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. This whole thing is such a mess that I’d be willing to fork out some extra creds if you can get this done.

-Twitch

vaughn_assassination_PA_H_desc.en:
<EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> of the People’s Alliance, certainly seems to have a reputation about them, based on the importance our client has placed on this being handled in a timely and exacting manner.

But we’ll spare you the details. All you need to do is travel to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and put an end to their life. Expect a well-armed ship and highly competent backup to boot. They seem to take themselves quite seriously.

Sincerely,
Vaughn

headhunters_multikillship_base_Generic_M.en:
A lotta wannabe gangs have stepped to the Headhunters over the years thinking that they could force their way into the system. We're still here. They aren't. But it seems the survivors of these groups have decided to band together and try again. Guess some people never learn.

Latest group hit a couple of our convoys while on supply runs. Shouldn't be a surprise that the Judge wants to stomp them out quick. We've learned they're out near [LOCATION] and likely rearming for another attack. 

We want you to go there and make them wish they died with their old gang.

Stows out

EckhartSecurity_RecoverCargo_VeryHard_De.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Recover Cargo
Approval code: = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Calling for a skilled contractor to recover a displaced shipment located at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Client's hauler was transporting some high value cargo when they decided to respond to a distress beacon and got ambushed by a group of outlaws. The client believes their pilot is gone but their cargo could still be recovered.

The information we have so far is that you'll need a ship that can carry <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4>, a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> for shifting the goods, as well as your support ships to help deal with the outlaws at the location. 

Client will be expecting the completed delivery to be made to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

UWC_Refueling_high_desc_001.en:
Hi,

Another day another beacon. There's a <EM4>[SHIP]</EM4> with an empty tank at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.  The client vessel will pay you at the rate of <EM4>[FUELRATE] aUEC per SCU of Hydrogen</EM4> and  <EM4>[QTFUELRATE] aUEC per SCU of Quantum </EM4>, and as a United Wayfarers Club contractor, you will also qualify for the UWC service fee listed above upon completion.

I can't lie: it's a nasty place to get stuck and a worse place to get caught by surprise. We've lost good people out there - even the ones who got lucky made it home with pieces missing.

If you decide to take the job, do me a favour and keep everything peeled. If you've got a buddy with time to spare, maybe reach out for a little back-up.

Maybe I'm being paranoid, but that doesn't mean they're not out to get you, as Momma Deloit used to say. 
Actually she never said that - but I'm pretty sure she would if she did this for a living.

Just do the job and get home safe, okay?

Dina Deloit
Dispatch Hub
United Wayfarers Club
"We’ve got your back"

CFP_RecoverCargo_Hard_Description.en:
We were in the process of delivering an urgent shipment to the folks over at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> when our pilot ran into a group of outlaws. They tried to run, but it was already too late.

There is silver lining though. The trackers are showing the cargo is still intact, located at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. There's a good chance the outlaws are guarding it while they locate a ship big enough to transport everything. While I don't want to risk losing another pilot, the need of the cargo aboard is desperate enough that it justifies the decision to send someone to recover it.

This won't be easy, these outlaws showed our pilot no mercy. You'll need to take them out first before getting the cargo back. Bring a ship that can store <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> for the moving. Deliver it to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>  and let's make this right.

Fly safe,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

Highpoint_KillAnimals_MultiType_M_desc.en:
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists are dedicated to keeping the delicate ecosystems of the empire in balance. A client recently hired us to evaluate the environmental impact of a number of invasive creatures near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. We’ve determined that to preserve the natural order of the region a conscientious culling of these species is necessary.  

Looking for someone able and willing to help in this effort. Please refer to <EM4>"The Guide to Stanton Wildlife"</EM4> in your Journal for further information on the creatures being targeted.     

Best,

Wanda Werkheiser
Contract Manager
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists

Highpoint_KillAnimals_storm_H_desc_001.en:
As a consequence of the ongoing radiation storm on Pyro I, some of the invasive kopions have become irradiated. This poses a threat to the health of the indigenous wildlife and to those who live and work in <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. 

We are seeking out a skilled contractor who can cull any irradiated kopions in and around <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Do not accept this contract unless you have the proper weapons and equipment that can reliably function in a radioactive environment. 

Your compensation will be adjusted to match the risks associated with this contract.

Best,

Wanda Werkheiser
Contract Manager
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists

TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_BigBooma.en: Wikelo find very strange but functional weapon while wandering through your systems. It very simple but very effective. If you bring me things, I show you what I do to it.\n\nVery fun.

headhunters_sabotage_generators_E_CFP_de.en:
We got big plans about to go down but unfortunately Citizens for Prosperity have people nearby at  [LOCATION].

Since I can't afford to have those bastards cockin' things up for us, I want you to go there and take out their power generators.

Should keep them sidelined until we're done with our business. 

-Stows out

cfp_bounty_desc_HeadHunters_001.en:
This is a general warning. We have learned that the Headhunters are transporting a large amount of weapons into the system with the intent of launching attacks against CFP-owned settlements.

While we believe that change can only come to this system through nonviolence. The presence of these weapons will undoubtedly cause considerably more bloodshed and devastation so we want to remove them from the equation.

Any of our supporters with appropriate combat training are asked to undertake this dangerous assignment out near [LOCATION]. We will compensate you for the tremendous risk you are taking.

Thank you and be safe out there,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

Eckhart_ShipAmbush_VH_desc.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Ship Ambush
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

A high profile client recently lost an important shipment when a pilot double-crossed them and ran off with their product. After weeks of hunting we’ve discovered that they were connected with an outlaw pack, so the client is looking to us to deter similar future issues from arising. The ultimate target is the pilot of a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>, who leads the crew responsible. This won’t be easy. They don’t go anywhere without escort fighters and sub-capital ships. That’s why we highly recommend that you find a trusted friend or two who can handle this with you.  
  
Intel gathered by our analysts indicates that they frequently fly by an <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> which would provide an excellent area to stage a surprise strike.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract. We’re also adding a bonus payment of <EM4>12 MG Scrip</EM4> that’ll go to the main contractor.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

blackbox_recover_desc_intro_001.en:
Who we are and what we do is not important. All you gotta know is that we need things to get done and we pay people to do it.

If everything goes well, we don’t ever have to meet. Doesn’t that sound good?

Got a good one to start you off, nice and simple. There’s a blackbox from a downed ship at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> that we want.

All you have to do is take it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and you get paid. Easy right? Watch out for scavs, you never know what kind of weirdos are hanging around these abandoned ships.

-Bit Zeros

Hockrow_BlackBox_space_Intro_Desc_001.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #BRI1652
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
Hockrow Agency is currently looking for new contractors to aid in our investigations around the ’verse. A common staple in the quick resolution of a crime, the retrieval of a ship’s <EM4>blackbox</EM4> can provide critical insight into building a successful case. 

If you’re eager to work with Hockrow, we want to offer a cut-and-dry blackbox retrieval op to see how it fits. 

I suspect that the perpetrators are long gone by now, so you shouldn't run into any resistance.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Head out to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, secure the black box in the derelict spaceship there and return it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
Successful completion of this task will open up other employment opportunities within Hockrow Agency.

DeadSaints_HaulCargo_SingleToMulti_desc_.en:
We're looking for someone discreet to move a new batch of altruciatoxin to a number of buyers . Yeah, it's illegal, but only if you get caught. 

The shipment is at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. You'll need to take it to these drop points:

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

[SINGLETOMULTITOKEN]

Be sure your ship can carry size <EM4>8 SCU</EM4> containers, and don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>. Not sure how you're planning on moving the boxes, otherwise.

-Twitch

DeadSaints_HaulCargo_MultiToSingle_desc_.en:
One of our best distributors got busted in Stanton so we need a replacement. The guy was an incredible salesman, but a shit smuggler. We need someone who won't run face-first into a security patrol or a pack of pirates to pick up some merchandise at these locations:

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER) 

- [LOCATION 1]
- [LOCATION 2]

And bring it all to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> before security catches on to what's happening. You'll need enough space on your ship for size <EM4>2 SCU</EM4> containers, and a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> should make loading and unloading nice and easy. 

-Twitch

DeadSaints_HaulCargo_SingleToMulti_desc_.en:
If you've got a fast ship, can discreetly carry size <EM4>8 SCU</EM4> containers, and love getting a huge payout, we need you to head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> immediately and take what you find there to these drop points:

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER) 

- [LOCATION 1]
- [LOCATION 2]  

The buyers are paying a premium to get their hands on fresh stormwal meat. Stay sharp. If security catches you with this, it's your ass on the line. If you're smart, you'll use a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to get everything loaded up quick. 

-Twitch

- [LOCATION 1]
- [LOCATION 2]  

The buyers are paying a premium to get their hands on fresh stormwal meat. Stay sharp. If security catches you with this, it's your ass on the line. If you're smart, you'll use a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to get everything loaded up quick. 

-Twitch

DeadSaints_HaulCargo_SingleToMulti_desc_.en:
We've got a shipment of contraband that needs to be hauled to a couple of different places. If you like creds, head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, load everything up, and bring it to these drop points:  

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)

- [LOCATION 1]
- [LOCATION 2]
- [LOCATION 3]

You're gonna need a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to move the boxes and enough room in your cargo hold for size <EM4>2 SCU</EM4> containers. 

Avoid other ships if you can. Security will bust you if they figure out what you're hauling, and raiders will just take it for themselves. 

-Twitch

DeadSaints_HaulCargo_AToB_intro_desc.en:
Call me Twitch. I run the Dead Saints. 

I doubt this is the first time you've heard of us, but in case you haven't, we do a lot of things, but one of them is transporting goods that need discreet handling. 

I got your info from one of my contacts. They say you've got the stuff we like in a hauler, which works for me, because we're looking for one. 

Here's my proposal – we're offering creds to the pilot that can transport some special cargo for us. Your ship’s hold will need room for <EM4>2 SCU cargo containers</EM4>, and you'll need a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> for loading and unloading. All you have to do is get everything from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> without getting security involved. 
 
If you can pull the job off, the Saints will have more contracts for you down the line. 

-Twitch

DeadSaints_HaulCargo_AToB_desc_ToGrimHEX.en:
If you're looking for creds, the Saints need someone with hauling experience to do a supply run from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. 

You're gonna need a ship that can hold size <EM4>16 SCU cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to move the boxes around. 

Don't open the crates but just so you know, most of this stuff is legal but not all of it. Try not to cross paths with anyone who might make that a problem for you. Get me?

-Twitch

DeadSaints_HaulCargo_AToB_desc_Cryopods_.en:
Got an interesting one. Some folks who were suckered into life/labor contracts with Hurston Dynamics want to get as far from Lorville as they possibly can. They struck a deal with a people mover and got themselves put on ice. Now they just need someone to pick them up and give them a ride. 

If you're up for some popsicle smuggling, you'll find [TOTAL] cryopods at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> that need to go to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Make sure you have space in your cargo hold for size <EM4>2 SCU</EM4> containers. If you use a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>, you should be able to get everyone loaded up before Hurston security catches on. 

HD isn't too keen on anyone slipping out of their contracts, so watch your back. They shoot to kill. 

If you can pull this off, there's a nice paycheck in it for you.

-Twitch

headhunters_eliminateall_retrievestolen_.en:
Local crew decided to hit one of our convoys and steal our shit. They got away, but we aren't gonna let them celebrate for long. I want you to head out to [LOCATION] where they got a base, blast them into ash, and get our stuff back. 

Once you got the cargo, take it over to [DESTINATION] and we can all forget these assholes ever existed.

Stows out.

headhunters_EliminateSpecific_Asteroid_G.en:
Got word of crew that's been pulling jobs and building a rep for themselves. Since they've said they don't want anything to do with Headhunters, we're looking to break 'em apart before they become a problem. Their leader is some punk named [TARGET] and we figure if they met the wrong end of a bullet, the rest of them would break apart.

We're told you can find [TARGET] around [LOCATION]. Head over and take care of it.

They shouldn't pose much of a problem to a pro like you.

Stows out.

HeadHunters_DefendEntitesAndEscort_VH_De.en:
So, I thought we had done a good job of keeping things on the quiet side, but looks like the fact <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> has Headhunters ties has gotten out. Now there are some heavy operators causing major problems there, targeting the <EM>[OBJECTS]</EM4> and generally causing me a massive headache.

With the amount of firepower these interlopers are packing, you're gonna need to bring along a <EM4>crew of your own</EM4> to pull this off. Especially since I need you to be protecting any <EM4>friendly ships</EM4> that need help.

This op needs to go off without a hitch, so I’m offering the main contractor <EM4>6 Council Scrip</EM4> for a job well done. 

Stows out.

cfp_defend-criminals_desc_001.en:
We learned that [LOCATION] is under threat of attack by outlaws and has asked for assistance. We need someone to protect them and drive away the outlaws. 

Make sure you stay close after their initial attack. Too often, outlaws win fights just by sending more bodies than anyone can reasonably defend against, so make sure you fight off any reinforcements before leaving the area. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

Seems someone has been tipped off that if the [OBJECTS] there are destroyed that it will severely interrupt Headhunter operations in the area. That's a problem I want you to fix. Not gonna lie, theses mercs are no joke. It'd be foolish to go it alone. That’s why you’ll need to be fully supplied and find some trustworthy friends to fly at your wing. This op needs to go off without a hitch, so I’m offering the main contractor 7 Council Scrip for a job well done. Stows out.

Intersec_DefendShip_Desc_Easy_001.en:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System 
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ship 
Briefing: Require urgent assistance for an InterSec operative who is currently under fire at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.

A group of outlaws had previously taken our operative captive with the intention of extracting sensitive information from them, but miraculously they were able to escape. Unfortunately, the pursuing outlaws now have them pinned down.

Due to the number of the ships assaulting them, we're offering additional compensation to accommodate the added danger. <EM4>Recruiting additional ships</EM4> to support you in this mission is highly advised.

Respectfully,   

Deacon Tobin 
Operations Manager 
InterSec Defense Solutions  

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify the sender. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.

cfp_eliminateall_fromCFP_hh_M_desc_001.en:
We received an emergency comm from [LOCATION] reporting that they are currently under attack by a group of Headhunters. We know our presence in the system has upset the Headhunters, but it hardly excuses this unprovoked attack.

If available, please gather your gear and head out. Just understand that Headhunters are experienced fighters and will not back down easily.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

Headhunters_EliminateAll_OLP_H_desc_001.en:
Surprise, surprise. Seems like not everyone’s happy that the Headhunters are making inroads in Stanton. One crew in particular has been hitting our people and then scurrying back to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. 

Want you to go there and give ‘em a taste of their own medicine. Removing these lickboots should send a pretty clear message about what happens if you screw with us. 

Stows out.

LingFamily_RecoverCargo_VeryHard_Descrip.en:
Hey,

Need a reliable contractor to help us out with a bit of a situation.

Our of our haulers has dropped out mid-contract and now our client's cargo is stuck in transit. Think they were trying to negotiate a better rate with us, but that's not how Ling does business. Anyway, they're done and we desperately need the shipment finished.

Petra and I have been working with this client for years now and have built up a good rapport. Be a shame to throw that all a way because of an unreliable hauler. Can you head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and collect the shipment? You'll need a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and a ship that can carry <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4>.

Take the shipment to the freight elevator over at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and we'll get you paid as soon as. We'd really appreciate your help with this and I'm sure our client would too.

Thanks,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator 
Ling Family Hauling 

Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.

Foxwell_DestroyNarcotics_H_desc_001.en:
Reports of a spike in drug overdoses around Stanton has security services worried. Seems like some two-bit crew is juicing their profits by cutting their stuff with toxic chemicals. Shutting down this crew and stopping the distribution of their drugs has become a top priority.

A Foxwell informant has revealed that part of this crew has currently set up shop at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Hiring a contractor to hustle over there and destroy whatever drugs they’ve got stashed before they’re spread across the system. Better be careful though, word is this crew is armed to the teeth and determined to profit off that poison no matter what.

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

cfp_sabotage_servers_M_HH_desc_001.en:
The Headhunters recently attacked one of our transports and were sadly able to get their hands on some secure data. Although the encryption on it is strong, its only a matter of time before they'll be able to access it.

Before that happens, we need you to go to [LOCATION] and destroy all traces of the information from their servers.

You'd really be helping Citizens for Prosperity out if you can pull this off.
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

Foxwell_DestroyNarcotics_M_desc_001.en:
We’ve been contracted to take care of a problem at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. There’s been a recent surge of activity in the area tied to the drug trade. It appears to be a well-run operation and there’s a growing concern that it’ll expand wider if not stopped. Any chance you’re available to make sure that doesn’t happen?   

Job is pretty straightforward. Head to the site and destroy their stash of drugs. That way they won’t have the creds to expand their operations any further. I wouldn’t expect them to make this easy on you though. Armed guards are regularly seen around the facility, so be sure you’ve got enough gear to deal with them too. 

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

cfp_sabotage_VH_desc_001.en:
Citizens for Prosperity have been monitoring a very dangerous outlaw group at [LOCATION] and we believe that they are in midst of planning a major attack which could throw the whole system into upheaval.

In order to protect all the progress we've made here, we would like you to raid their compound and destroy all the servers housing their plans. 

This should at least provide us with enough of a reprieve for them to reconsider their offensive.

Thank you,
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

cfp_sabotage_servers_VH_XT_desc_001.en:
One of the Citizens for Prosperity members who have been serving as a XenoThreat informer has let us know that the data servers located at [LOCATION] our housing a trove of information vital to the gang's operation. 

If you were able to destroy these servers on our behalf it would be a huge win for the security of the entire system.
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

headhunters_bombingrun_VH_XT_desc_001.en:
I won't get into the long and complicated politics of why I'm asking you to do this, but it's enough for you to know that I want it done. 

Go to [LOCATION] and blow up the XenoThreat fuel reserves there. It'll really be helping me out of a tight spot.

-Stows

cfp_sabotage_servers_H_XT_desc_001.en:
We got a bit of a problem that I'm hoping you can solve for me. One of our informers has revealed that XenoThreat has been amassing data on Citizens for Prosperity operations throughout the system. 

This information, if used correctly, could put our people at serious risk. The best solution is for you to completely destroy the servers where the data is being stored at [LOCATION].

With their trove of information wiped out, it should give our people a fighting chance.
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

vaughn_assassination_PA_VH_desc.en:
We hope you enjoy a challenge, because this one is looking to be far from a walk in the park.

For reasons our client was unwilling to disclose, a rather prominent member of the People’s Alliance needs disposing of. The target, <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>, was last seen at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> piloting a high-class ship accompanied by several skilled allies.

Do make the most of this opportunity.

Sincerely,
Vaughn

CFP_SabotageRelays_HH_001_Desc.en:
Violence is never our first choice, but sometimes it must be used as a preventative measure.

We’re planning a strike on a Headhunter controlled outpost and need your help.

We need to make sure that if something goes wrong they won’t be able to call for backup and escalate the situation. That’s where you come in. We need you to head over to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and disable the communication towers. There should be a <EM4>control panel located at the top</EM4> of each tower that you can use to deactivate them.

If you’re able to do this, Citizens for Prosperity will be able to gain some vital ground in Pyro.

It’s also worth keeping in mind for future contracts that you can choose to take out the comms towers instead of risking a fight with reinforcement dropships.

Stay alert and stay safe.

Thank you,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

cfp_sabotage_generators_VE_desc_001.en:
Following a series of raids against Citizens for Prosperity aligned settlements, we believe we have traced those responsible back to [LOCATION].

Attacking them directly will pose too great of a risk and most likely encourage aggressive reprisals. Instead, we believe that if their power generators were to be disable it could force them to settle somewhere else.

Do you think you could handle it for us?
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

searchbodyspace_desc_H.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP65817
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
A client has hired the agency to look for a missing friend who has not been returning their comms and have been acting increasingly erratic. The client has shared all the information they possess on <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> and we’ve been able to pinpoint their ship’s location.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Travel to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and verify the status of <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>. If they are deceased, examine their body and we will pass the information on to the client.

Additional Notes:
Our scout reported heavy outlaw activity in the vicinity and was forced to retreat, meaning we have designated this as a highly dangerous case.

vaughn_searchbody_space_H_Desc_001.en:
<EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> was a name that proved particularly troublesome for some time. Whether a master of evasion or just unerringly lucky all of our attempts have thus far failed.

With that being said, it seems that someone else may have beaten us to the punch so to speak. We’d like you to visit <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and confirm if the target has indeed been neutralized. But be advised, I suspect they’re former crew may still be in the area, most likely out of a misplaced sense of loyalty. I’d suggest a crew of your own for this one, but will defer to your expertise.

Sincerely,

Vaughn

headhunters_ChainElimAll_1C_ElimSpec_Att.en:
We've been trying to play nice with these Citizens for Prosperity people, but they've made it abundantly clear that we don't have a place in their 'safe system.' Their use of mercs for security have been causing all kinds of unreasonable violence like when this asshole [TARGET] opened fire on a group of settlers to drive them away from an outpost they'd been eyeing. So now the gloves are coming off.

I need some hard workers to go hit [LOCATION] and take out [TARGET]. Odds are, they'll stay hidden until you prove you're enough of a threat, so make sure you do some damage.

Stows out.

headhunters_EliminateSpecific_XenoThreat.en:
Got a line on a XenoThreat that's been a pain in the ass. Not sure if you've heard the name, but [TARGET] is a scumbag even by XenoThreat standards. Vicious, sadistic, and a prick to boot. We want someone to punch their number. You up for it?

Last word was that they were somewhere around [LOCATION]. Head there and take 'em out. Pretty simple.

Stows out.

spacecollect_cargo_desc_intro_01.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Red Wind is excited to announce that we are looking to hire new couriers to help with deliveries across the ’verse. We pride ourselves on been a flexible company that’s eager to meet the needs of all clients, everywhere. We’ll ask no questions; if you want it there, we’ll get it there. If that sounds like you, we have an introductory contract to see if you’re the right fit.

We need a resilient new hire to head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, recover the package abandoned by a former employee, and finish the delivery.

PACKAGES TO RECOVER
     · <EM4>1x [ITEM1]</EM4>

DROP OFF LOCATION
     · Deliver to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>

If you’re able to handle this contract we’d be delighted to send you more courier opportunities.

TAKE PRIDE IN YOUR WORK – Even as a contractor you are representing Red Wind Linehaul. Do not intentionally do anything to harm the company’s reputation.

deadsaints_recoveritem_Intro_Desc_001.en:
Here’s the deal. Dead Saints need some new blood to help shift gear across the ’verse and if you can prove yourself useful, you could make some nice creds doing it.

Got an easy one to start you out. Couple of hours ago, something went down over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and a pilot of mine got ghosted. My tracker’s telling me that they didn’t find the stash of gear in there.

If you can get out there, get the package back and take it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> without dying, I might have some more work for you. Can’t see you running into too much trouble as any ships you spot will likely be scavs looking for a quick cred. I’m sure you can take care of that.

-Twitch

ATTENTION ALL FTL COURIERS
FOR IMMEDIATE ASSIGNMENT

**CONTRACT DETAILS** 

PICKUP LOCATION – One of our ships went down at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Need a courier to retrieve the package.

DROPOFF LOCATION – Package will need to be delivered to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. 

THREAT LEVEL – <EM4>Minimal combat</EM4> expected.
TRAVEL – All transportation needs should be arranged by courier. 

[SIGN_OFF]

bitzeros_shipheist_E_desc_001.en:
Get this, we were sifting through some comms and picked up some excitement about a big score. It was easy work to figure out where they're hiding a ship loaded with cargo and we figured, hey, why keep this profitable knowledge to ourselves? 

Send us a few creds in finder fees and we'll send you the coordinates of the asteroid base where the ship is stashed. It’s locked inside a hangar, so you’ll need to get to it via the station’s elevators. But once inside, you’ll be able to override the lockdown at a console. Do that and it should be easy pickings.

57 65 65 76 69 6c

Headhunters_DefendLocation_VE_Desc_001.en:
Headhunters flying in and out of <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> are being harassed by some aggressive upstarts. Need them dealt with before they become a real pain in the ass.   

Get there and I’ll update you on what these pests are doing so you can hunt ‘em down. 

Clear ‘em all out I’ll throw <EM4>2 Council Scrip</EM4> to whoever accepted this gig as a bonus.

- Stows

cfp_bombingrun_E_desc_001.en:
We've been having escalating issues with the outlaws at [LOCATION] and can no longer stand by and watch as their aggressive actions hurt our community. 

We are wary of launching a full scale assault, but believe that if their fuel stores are wiped out, it would deter them from further hostile actions. 

If you're able, I'd appreciate you handling the destruction of the fuel personally. A ship capable of launching missiles would probably make the most sense, but I leave that up to you.

Thanks,
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

InterSec_KillShip_Vanduul_Desc_Super_001.en:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Vanduul
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ship
Briefing: InterSec requires the services of a skilled pilot who’s prepared to assist in taking down a dangerous Vanduul target that has been involved in numerous attacks.

Vanduul incursions have been on the rise recently, posing not only a threat to the system of Nyx, but the UEE as a whole. It is imperative that these sightings are responded to in a swift and efficient manner. 

We require you to fly to the last known sighting of the Vanduul ship at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and eliminate them immediately.  

Vanduul pilots are highly skilled and extremely dangerous. Engage the enemy immediately and do not hesitate – they will not show the same mercy.

Compensation proportionate to the risk of the contract will be awarded.

Respectfully,
Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.

Foxwell_X2_DrawOutBoss_Desc.en:
We have intercepted a location beacon that puts <EM>[TARGET]</EM4> and their personal attack wing at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. They have been one of XenoThreat's most brutal enforcers since their founding. 

<EM>[TARGET]</EM4>'s not one to back down from a fight so hit their ships hard enough, do enough damage and they won't be able to resist joining in the action. Once they're out in the open, they'll be your main target.

Ready to go?

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

HeadHunters_ShipAmbush_S_desc_001.en:
Headhunters are looking for someone with the skills and crew to execute an elite op. A military frigate and escort ships are stalking one of our Clips around the system. Don’t know their intentions but it can’t be good. Figure while they’ve got their eyes focused on their prize, we get someone to gather a crew to hit ‘em.  

Already got a spot picked out. If you get to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> there’s an emission cloud that’s exactly what we need. Head there with friends, power down your ships, and wait for the <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> and its escorts to pass by. 

With a bonus of <EM4>16 Council Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor, payment alone should make this worth your while, but you can also keep anything you scrounge from the wreckage.

- Stows

FTL_Courier_Nyx_Easy_Desc_001.en:
AVAILABLE FTL CONTRACT
FOR IMMEDIATE ASSIGNMENT

**CONTRACT DETAILS**
FTL requires an entry-level courier to complete deliveries in Nyx.
Courier must provide own transportation.
Prior training in manual lifting is preferred, with the <EM4>ability to move boxes of up to .25 SCU</EM4> in weight.
By accepting this contract you agree to take full responsibility for the safety of the assigned packages.

Good luck and good speed, courier!

FTL_Courier_Stanton_Easy_Desc_001.en:
AVAILABLE FTL CONTRACT
FOR IMMEDIATE ASSIGNMENT

**CONTRACT DETAILS** 
A reliable and hardworking entry-level courier is needed to ferry a delivery in Stanton.
You will be responsible for providing your own transportation.
Interested contractors need the <EM4>ability to lift up to .25 SCU boxes</EM4>.
Contractors are employed on an independent basis and therefore not covered by FTL's company insurance.

Good luck and good speed, courier!

cfp_sabotage_server_elimiatespecific_HH_.en:
We're just putting the full picture together now, but so far we've learned that a Headhunter by the name of [TARGET] recently stole some sensitive data that if exposed will be detrimental to Citizens for Prosperity's cause. 

We need to ensure that all traces of the stolen data are eradicated. This means taking out all the Headhunter servers at [LOCATION] as well as tracking down [TARGET] to stop them from further disseminating the information.

Your help is much appreciated,
 
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

Intersec_ShipWaveAttack_DrawOutBoss_S_De.en:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: [LOCATION]
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Capital Ship
Briefing: An outlaw fleet lead by <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> has been planning a potentially devastating strike against sensitive UEE targets. InterSec has been tasked with dealing with this threat before their attack can be launched.

After putting together a fighting force of your own, head to the site and engage with the hostiles there. Their leader will not risk entering into the fray themselve unless they feel their operation is suitably at risk. Stay at the site and take out hostile targets, until you can engage with the groups leader directly and put a stop to this heinous attack once and for all.

Respectfully, 

Deacon Tobin 
Operations Manager 
InterSec Defense Solutions  

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.

northrock_bounty_PVP_desc_first.en:
Hi,

Hope you don't mind, but I was made aware of your Bounty Hunters Guild status and wanted to reach out and see if you'd be interested in contracting with Northrock Service Group, one of the top rated private security firms in the system.

If you are, the first step would be to complete a pro tem suspect apprehension. It's less of an evaluation and more of a chance to make sure that we can have a good working relationship. 

The suspect you would be after is known as <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>. They are known to be particularly elusive so you may have your work cut out for you.

Hope to hear from you soon, 

Braden Corchado
Logistics Officer - Stanton Branch
Northrock Service Group

cfp_eliminateall_intro_desc_001.en:
Welcome to the system, not sure if you're familiar with our organization but Citizens for Prosperity are a non-profit organization dedicated to bringing security and civilization to unclaimed systems.

If you're looking for work in the system and would like to help achieve our goal, we are looking for anyone with combat experience to help secure <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> that has been taken over by a group of outlaws.

We've tried to work with them but have only been met with violence and threats.

Once complete, we can offer you a variety of new job opportunities in this system and beyond.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

Foxwell_Mercenary_Intro_desc_001.en:
Are you an experienced contractor looking to increase your income with some security work? Or maybe you’re new to the field and are looking for some hands-on experience? 

Foxwell Enforcement are looking for enthusiastic new contractors to help with local law enforcement. To see if you’re the right fit for us, we’d like for you to head over to <EM4>[LOCATION]<EM4> and support the security forces on site. Local gang members have been giving that spot problems. Help the local forces take care of these outlaws to qualify for more contract opportunities with Foxwell.

Contractors are employed on a strictly freelance basis. Foxwell expects contractors to supply their own weapons and armor and does not accept any responsibility for any injuries, damages, or deaths accumulated during the contract.

Good luck,

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.
Foxwell_Mercenary_Intro_desc_001.tr:
Are you an experienced contractor looking to increase your income with some security work? Or maybe you’re new to the field and are looking for some hands-on experience? 

Foxwell Enforcement are looking for enthusiastic new contractors to help with local law enforcement. To see if you’re the right fit for us, we’d like for you to head over to <EM4>[LOCATION]<EM4> and support the security forces on site. Local gang members have been giving that spot problems. Help the local forces take care of these outlaws to qualify for more contract opportunities with Foxwell.

Contractors are employed on a strictly freelance basis. Foxwell expects contractors to supply their own weapons and armor and does not accept any responsibility for any injuries, damages, or deaths accumulated during the contract.

Good luck,

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement

The client claims that this escort is purely a precautionary measure, but that doesn’t mean you should drop your guard. Expect some hostile forces and deal with them appropriately.

This contract is non-negotiable.

RedWind_HaulCargo_AToB_desc_01.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------  

Need a pilot for a straightforward haul going from the freight elevator at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Should be easy enough as long as you got a ship that can handle containers up to <EM4>4 SCU</EM4> in size. 

Credits don't come much easier than this. Just be careful as the route's not exactly in the safest of sectors. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.

cfp_maintenance_H_desc_001.en:
We need some help. The CFP facility at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> suffered severe damage during a recent electrical storm and we're looking for anyone who can help with repairs.

Surveying the site, you'll have to bring <EM4>six fuses</EM4>, a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4>, and <EM4>enough RMC canisters to take care of eight or so pipes</EM4>. That should be enough to repair the damage and get the outpost back in operation.

If you need more information on maintenance work, see <EM4>“Cornerstone Developments' Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> entry in your mobiGlas Journal.

Do you think you can help?

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

Covalex_RecoverCargo_VeryEasy_Descriptio.en:
Hi,

So I had a contractor who was supposed to deliver some stuff for us but has completely gone off the radar. I've pinged their ship and I've got no idea what's happened but they're floating around somewhere over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. If you could head over there recover the cargo and take it to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> you'd be doing me a huge favor.

Don't forget to bring a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to move all the cargo. Oh and a ship that can transport <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4>.

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' 

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_L22Wolf.en: Wikelo very excited. Have idea for new material. But making it is most tricky. Very complicated. Need help fabricating a test sample. I give you blueprint, you make, bring to me, and I will trade. Give you extra special L-22 Wolf. Very powerful, very wolf.

EckhartSecurity_RecoverCargo_Super_Descr.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Recover Cargo
Approval code: = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Putting out an immediate call for a highly skilled contractor to reclaim a client's cargo located at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.

Client hired an expert hauler to transport something discreetly, but it seems some information regarding the shipment was either hacked or leaked. The pilot was attacked and now the shipment is stranded. We need you and any support ships you bring to make it to the site before the cargo is lost for good. 

You will need a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and a ship capable of storing <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4>.

After assessing the situation and the importance the client has placed on the recovery of the cargo, we have decided to reward a high payout for the successful delivery of the shipment to the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

EckhartSecurity_DestroyServers_FacilityD.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Destroy Server
APPROVAL CODE = VS-14

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

This a simple seek and destroy contract. The client has requested that several servers located at an ASD research site be destroyed as soon as possible. Under no circumstances should these servers be accessed, or copies of the data made.

The client believes that the servers are somewhere in the <EM4>Engineering wing</EM4>, most likely in the <EM4>Management</EM4> area. In addition to this, there is a strong chance you won’t be the only presence on-site so be wary of potential hostiles.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

LingFamily_RecoverCargo_VeryEasy_Descrip.en:
Hey,

Here's the thing: one of our haulers has run into some trouble over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and had to ditch their ship. Could you head over there and help us finish the delivery?

Not a huge job by any means, but you'll still need a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and a ship with enough space to store <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4>.
 
Drop the cargo off at the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and we'll send you the creds.

Thanks,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator 
Ling Family Hauling 

Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.

HeadHunters_RecoverCargo_Medium_Descript.en:
One of our pilots was supposed to bring a shipment back to us, but seems like he got into some trouble over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Either he got his brains blasted all over the cockpit, or freaked out and ditched his ship. For his sake, I hope it’s the first one so I don’t have the hunt this asshole down. What’s important right now is that our cargo’s just sitting out there.

If you’ve got a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and a decent ship, can you head over there and get our stuff? Chances are the assholes who attacked my pilot are still there, and I’m betting they’re pretty tough.

If you get out alive, take the cargo to the freight elevator at [DESTINATION] and I’ll get you paid.

Stows out.

DeadSaints_RecoverCargo_VeryEasy_Descrip.en:
One of my haulers has run into some trouble over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and was forced to ditch their ship. I need someone to go there with <EM4>a heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to grab the cargo and finish the job.

They were carrying a decent supply of gear for me, and the last thing I need is for some do-gooder to come across it and trace it back to us.

If you do run into anybody, no need to be friendly. Just shoot the asshole and get my gear. Understood?

Take it to the freight elevator over at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and I’ll make sure you get a cut of the sale.

-Twitch

DeadSaints_RecoverCargo_VeryHard_Descrip.en:
We got a situation. Some gang that no one’s heard of are trying to make a name for themselves by targeting our transport ships. They think they can make a big show of how tough they are raiding our haulers and acting like they’re big shots. Amateurs.

Problem is, they got lucky during their last attack. Our pilot barely made it out alive, but their ship is still sitting full of supplies over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.

Grab a crew you can trust and your <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and get your ass over there.

After, drop the gear off at the freight elevator in <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. You do this for me and I’ll give you a good cut of the sale.

-Twitch

cfp_hauling_intro_desc_001.en:
Welcome to the system, not sure if you're familiar with our organization but Citizens for Prosperity are a non-profit organization dedicated to bringing security and civilization to unclaimed systems.

If you're looking for work in the system and would like to help achieve our goal, we need a package picked up from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and taken to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Once complete, we can offer you a variety of new job opportunities in this system and beyond.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

vaughn_assassination_PA_M_desc.en:
It seems the People’s Alliance have been ruffling some feathers recently. A client of ours would be most thrilled if you can prevent [TARGET] from meddling in their affairs ever again.

You’ll find them around <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, and from what our client has told us, it’s unlikely that they’re alone. These aren’t your run-of-the-mill pilots, they might even pose a slight threat to your safety.

Do try your best to keep it as clean as possible.

Sincerely,
Vaughn

TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_KopSkull.en:
Hello. Can make fun change to gun if you want. Use kopion skin for pattern and little skull dangle. Very effective. Shoot much better.

All you need is bring me parts to <EM4>[DESTINATIONS]</EM4> and will make. 

Bye.

RAIN_CollectResources_storm_desc_003.en:
To all available contractors,

We at Rayari are dedicating all our energy to stopping the regeneration technology crisis in its tracks, but to continue their efforts our scientists need materials that the company's suppliers cannot obtain. 

Rayari is seeking an experienced contractor to gather <EM4>irradiated valakkar fangs</EM4>, which can be extracted from adult valakkar that have been extensively exposed to radiation. Our scans have uncovered the existence of a qualifying population inside the storm near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. 

Because these animals are highly dangerous, Rayari is offering premium pay to anyone who can assist with collecting the fangs.  

Once attained, please take these valuable resources to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing

Headhunters_HaulCargo_MultiToSingle_desc.en:
We’ve been using the old Hathor <EM4>[LOCATION1]</EM4> and <EM4>[LOCATION2]</EM4> as stashes, but it turns out some over-eager nullbrains sniffed them out and are trying to boost our shit for their own.

Luckily, the goods are still there - for now. We need someone to visit that PAF and OLP, grab our stuff from the freight elevators, and take it to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> where we should be able to keep it on ice. 

Here’s the list of what to grab. Don’t care what order you do ‘em in. Be sure to bring a ship that can store <EM4>32 SCU</EM4> at the very least. 

- [LOCATION 1]
- [LOCATION 2]
- [LOCATION 3]

Make sure you’re ready to deal with whatever assholes you run across. A <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> would also be smart to bring along. 

Stows out.

HeadHunters_RecoverCargo_VeryHard_Descri.en:
Here’s the thing, I got a situation over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and need someone with a brain between their ears to sort it out for me. Former pilot of mine thought he could cut a deal with another gang and unsurprisingly it didn’t work out for him. Now my cargo is sitting idle and being guarded by a whole bunch of nullbrains waiting for their hauler to come pick it up.

Need you to head there with a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> and a strong crew to get my shit back before its gone for good.

Take it all to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and I’ll give you a generous cut of the takings.

Stows out.

Headhunters_EliminateSpecific_PAF_desc_0.en:
Can’t believe how many criminals are crawling around this damn system. Guess we’ll have to make some room for ourselves. 

Got a list of high-level leaders here. Nothing brings chaos and disorder to the existing gangs like a good decapitation attack. The next target is <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>, who we’ve tracked to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Feel like ghosting ‘em?   

These old Hathor platform facilities are big and spread out. Doubt there’s a way to do this and not attract the attention of their foot soldiers. Ain’t gonna be easy but sure sounds like fun.

- Stows

headhunters_killship_xenothreat_ert_desc.en:
Need you to move quick on this one. There's a XenoThreat lieutenant named [TARGET] who's popped up for air. Judge thinks this is a big chance to mess with XenoThreat's command by taking them out. I heard [TARGET] was spotted flying around [LOCATION], so get there quick before they disappear again.

I'd bring some support, I doubt they'll go down without a fight. 

Stows out.

headhunters_ChainElimAll_AttackGen_E_des.en:
Looking for some hitters to go drop some violence on some local dipshits who've been pulling jobs in the system against Headhunters. We tried reaching out to explain the error of their ways, but they shot our messenger, so now we go with option B.

You'll find them holed up near [LOCATION]. Go there and repaint the walls with their blood.

Have fun.

Stows out.

bitzeros_shipheist_M_desc_001.en:
You'd figure that if people were planning a big heist they wouldn't leave all the details laying around spectrum where just about anybody could hack them? 

But hey, their loss is your gain. Currently, a cargo-heavy ship is locked down in the hangar of an asteroid base. Only way to access it is via the station’s elevators. Once inside, you’ll be able to use a console to override the lockdown to get everything out of there. We’ll happily sell you the coordinates, but the rest is up to you. 

Guess their loss will be our gain too.

57 65 65 76 69 6c

HeadHunters_RecoverCargo_VeryEasy_Descri.en:
Just got word of an abandoned ship with a fat stack of cargo ripe for the pluckin’. If you’re interested, you’ll need to head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Word might have gotten around, so there’s probably some skags hanging around, but just ghost them and get the stash.

Bring the cargo to the freight elevator at [DESTINATION] and I’ll get you your creds.

Make sure you got a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> on you too, no idea how big or small that cargo is.

Stows out.

headhunters_eliminateall_xt_desc_001.en:
It's sad to say but we lost one of our outposts to XenoThreat. Appalling if you ask me, but that's why we're looking for someone who's got the time and ammunition to take it back.

If that's you, head over to [LOCATION] and take it back.

Stows out.

headhunters_EliminateSpecific_Generic_VH.en:
Word's come down through my bosses that we're settling old debts. I've got an open line on this old-time hitter named [TARGET] who's racked up a hefty kill list. We caught wind that they were hiding out with some people over at [LOCATION] who aren't the biggest fans of us, so they probably won't take kindly to you. [TARGET] is the target here, but you might have to mix it up with them.

Again, whenever we've tried to take out [TARGET], they've killed their killer. I feel like you'll fare better, but I'd bring backup if you got it.

Good luck.

-Stows
