headhunters_bombingrun_VE_desc_001.en:
Headhunters didn't get to be what it is today by playing nice. We've tracked down the hideout of a bunch of scraggy upstarts that have been making inroads into our territory. Need you to send a message.

Head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and blow the crap out of their fuel tanks. They'll think twice about muscling in on our operations when their ships are grounded.

-Stows out

HeadHunters_DefendEntitesAndEscort_S_Des.en:
The maintenance and reliable function of <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> is pretty darn important to the Headhunters, but this rival crew seems determined knock it out of contention. They're on site now, targeting <EM4>[OBJECTS]</EM4> there. 

Protecting the site, and any <EM4>friendly ships</EM4>, in the area is important enough that I want you to bring some <EM4>reliable backup along</EM4> when you go and terminate these nullbrains. 

To prove just how serious we are about getting this done right, the main contractor will earn <EM4>6 Council Scrip</EM4> for making sure absolutely nothing goes wrong.

- Stow

Headhunters_DefendDestructibleEntites_S_.en: Our partners at [LOCATION] need help. A rival outlaw crew are swarming the area and attacking the [OBJECTS] there. That’d be bad enough as is, but this site is absolutely critical to our future plans in the area and its damn important that it remains in working order. With the scale of this attack and the skill of these pilots, there's no doubt that some reliable backup would serve you well. Gather your crew, fly out to the site, and stop these bootlicks before they can do any lasting damage. To prove just how serious we are about getting this done right, the main contractor will earn 9 Council Scrip for making sure absolutely nothing goes wrong. - Stow

TheCollector_Ships_GuardianMX_Desc.en: You Humans enjoy strange letter combinations. It very funny. Guardian ship very useful but if you want even more useful, bring me things. I give you better ship. Look better. Act better.\n\nThank you. Bye.
TheCollector_Ships_GuardianMX_Desc.tr: You Humans enjoy strange letter combinations. It very funny. Guardian ship very useful but if you want even more useful, bring me things. I give you better ship. Look better. Act better.\n\nThank you. Bye.

Intersec_DefendShip_Vanduul_Desc_Super_0.en:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Vanduul
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ship
Briefing: An operator working with InterSec is currently being attacked by Vanduul ships at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. The likelihood of them surviving on their own is low, so we’re looking for a contractor willing to provide combat support.  

Contractors accepting this mission should be well supplied and ready to face the Vanduul threat head-on. 

Respectfully, 

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of confidential information solely intended for the recipient. Please disregard if received in error and notify the sender. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to UEE and system law where applicable.

headhunters_HaulCargo_RegionLink_desc_00.en:
You been doing good work for us, so I got a favor to ask. I'll still pay you, but it's a favor. Got some cargo that needs to get bounced from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and the guy that was supposed to do it found himself on the wrong side of an airlock, but hey, shit still needs to get done.

Only thing is you'll need a ship that can carry <EM4>4 SCU cargo containers</EM4>.  A <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> would also be smart to bring along. 

If you could sort it out for me, that'd be great.

- Stows out

cfp_defend_headhunters_H_desc_001.en:
A distress call just came in from [LOCATION] claiming that a large Headhunter force has just attacked our outpost there. There have been multiple deaths and injuries from those who managed to flee the scene. We're looking for any available security personnel to head there and retake the outpost.

Witness accounts identified the attackers as elite Headhunter enforcers, so watch yourself out there and bring help if you can. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

headhunters_defendship_LRT_PA_desc_001.en:
You busy? A promising prospect was doing a special run for me but ran into trouble with the People’s Alliance around <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. This one’s on me. Knew they weren’t the best dogfighter but thought they could do this without running into any other ships. 

Told ‘em to hold tight and do everything they can to stay alive until support gets there. Shouldn’t be too much trouble for someone with your skillset.  

-Stows

headhunters_defendship_LRT_desc_001.en:
Just got word that a Headhunter over near [LOCATION] got roped into a fight and now they can't see it through. The idiot wants me to save their sorry ass.

Guess I'm a soft touch, because I'm actually going to pay you to do it for me. What do you say? Wanna save a moron's life?

-Stows

headhunters_defendship_VLRT_desc_001.en:
Seems we got some upstarts trying to muscle in our operations by hitting a Headhunter ship near [LOCATION]. Not sure how they expected to get away with it.

They need to learn the hard way that's not how things work in Pyro. You up for heading over there and teaching these bastards a lesson?

- Stows out

headhunters_defendship_MRT_desc_001.en:
One of my pilots wasn't thinking straight and got themselves mixed up in a heap of trouble over at [LOCATION]. 

The real kicker is the fool has a full hold. Can't really afford to lose the stuff they're carrying, so I'd appreciate it if you could go bail them out for me. 

- Stows out

cfp_defendship_multi_HRT_SB_desc_001.en:
One of our convoys is in need of combat support. Sounds like they stumbled upon a Shattered Blade hideout while trying to make a delivery. Now, despite their best efforts, the convoy can’t get away. Looking for a combat pilot willing to head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to help them fight off this attack before it’s too late. 
  
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

CFP_ShipWaveAttack_ClearHostiles_Desc_VE.en:
Recently we've had incident reports of numerous Citizens for Prosperity contractors in the system having run-ins with an outlaw hunting party operating out of [LOCATION]. 

To help re-establish safer routes through that sector, you will be dispatched to head there and engage with these outlaws. The group is known to travel in smaller packs, so its important that you and whatever backup you bring wait in the area to deal with all of them or else there's a chance the threat will remain. 

Thank you for helping us,
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

cfp_ChainElimAll_1C_HHAttack_M_desc_001.en:
We just received a frantic comm from [LOCATION] and are looking for any available combat specialists to help repel a Headhunter attack. There are still hostiles on site and there are reports of several casualties so we need this handled quickly.

I will provide all relevant data upon acceptance. Thank you for your assistance.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

Headhunters_DefendLocation_H_Desc_001.en:
Got word that Headhunters ships heading to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> are coming under attack. Scans have revealed enemy forces in the wider region intent on targeting our ops. 

There’s enough of them that it’s gonna take more than one person to clear away all that trash. If you can grab your gear and a few friends, I could really use you out there.  

The specific attack areas and targets are evolving. Don’t worry about the details now. Just get there and I’ll let you know where you’re needed.  

Handle this right and I’ll give the main contractor a bonus <EM4>7 Council Scrip</EM4>.

- Stows
Headhunters_DefendLocation_H_Desc_001.tr:
Got word that Headhunters ships heading to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> are coming 遭到攻擊. Scans have revealed enemy forces in the wider region intent on targeting our ops.

headhunters_defendship_VLRT_PA_desc_001.en:
Guess some folks just can’t dogfight. Sent a young prospect out on patrol, and am now being barraged with comms about how they’re barely hanging on. Had them update me with the details about who they’re up against and I damn near fell outta my chair laughing.    

If this kid can’t handle a People’s Alliance ship, they sure ain’t ready for flight assignments. Appreciate it if you could save their hide anyway.

If you’re free, could you head over to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and show ‘em how it’s done?

-Stows

Foxwell_EliminateAll_Allies_desc_001.en:
Got word that outlaws are attempting to overrun <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. There’s local security forces there, but they’re struggling to stop that attack.

Need a contractor to hustle there and help take care of the aggressors. Bring plenty of gear, and be careful when engaging targets. Don’t want to hear about any security team members getting caught in your crossfire.    

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

EckhartSecurity_RecoverCargo_Hard_Descri.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Recover Cargo
Approval code: = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Got a transport in need of backup over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Signal was patchy, but their comms made it sound like a group of outlaws had gotten wind of what they were hauling and attempted to take it from them.

Considering the state of things before we lost contact, I'm considering this a recovery mission. Multiple hostiles are expected at the site, so a skilled crew is crucial for the success of this operation. There will be a high volume of cargo to deal with, so a ship that can carry <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> will be needed. 

Upon successful extraction of cargo, deliver to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

EckhartSecurity_EliminateBoss_DC_Desc_00.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Bounty
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

We’ve received actionable intelligence on a dangerous bounty, who’s turned out to be extremely elusive. <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> was spotted with a dedicated contingent of known associates at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. We’re looking for a contractor ready and willing to execute this bounty before they disappear again.

Based on previous attempts to apprehend this criminal, there’s a good chance that <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> will try to avoid a direct confrontation, and instead send their allies to confront you. We believe that neutralizing these protective forces, and shredding the safety net they provide, is the best way to draw out <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> to face you directly. 

Expect to confront a significant and skilled force. We advise that you plan accordingly. Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

eckhart_defendship_multi_HRT_desc_001.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Defend Ship
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Recently, we recommended that a client use a specific route to cross Nyx safely. Turns out it wasn’t as secure as we assumed, because a group ambushed our client’s ship. We need to get this cleaned up ASAP. Are you available to help? 

Intel from the client indicates a well-organized attack, so you better be equipped to deal with experienced hostiles on this one. Hurry to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, help them survive this, and we’ll pay you well for your trouble.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

Eckhart_ShipAmbush_S_desc.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Ship Ambush
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Recently, we sent a contractor after a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>, who was leading a crew targeting the operations of an extremely important client. Unfortunately, it was a trap and we lost some good people. We can’t let the target get away again, so we’ve decided the best course of action is to give them a dose of their own medicine.  

Ambushing this target seems like the safest course of action, and we’ve identified a good spot for such an attack. There’s an <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> that the target and their crew frequently fly by. You can power down your ship and hide there until you’re ready to strike. This crew is ruthless and extremely skilled. Don’t make the same mistake as the previous contractor and go this alone. It would be best for you to bring a few trusted friends to help handle this crew.    

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract. Plus, we’ll throw in a bonus payment of <EM4>16 MG Scrip</EM4> for the main contractor for taking care of this.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

headhunters_ChainElimAll_3C_ElimSpec_Att.en:
Got a big one here. We need a team to head out to [LOCATION]. Word is CFP are dug in at three different clusters in the area. Our judge wants them all cleared out. Seems one of their mercs, a real mean skag named [TARGET], is holed up at one of them. We want you to go there, clear them all out and take out [TARGET].

Get yourself a nice little payday in the process.

Stows out.

headhunters_killship_cfp_mrt_desc_001.en:
CFP Security forces have been attacking locals and we're looking to balance the scales. Caught wind of one in particular named [TARGET] who's been causing some damage and we need them taken out.

You can find them flying around [LOCATION]. Go introduce yourself.

Stows out.

headhunters_ChainElimAll_Boss_XenoThreat.en:
These XenoThreat assholes are like aloprats. Every time you thing you wipe them out, they just pop back up again. They seem to be back to their usual shit and trying to put together something big. No idea what, but we've been cleared to stop it before it starts.

A group of XenoThreat biggies are supposedly meeting at [LOCATION] to plan or just rage or whatever it is they do, but we're gonna bust it up. Or you are.

Head over there and wipe out everyone you find. Sure enough I'm sure the biggies will jump into the fight. That's what they always do.

This'll be a tough one. As much as I hate XenoThreat, they're damn good in a fight, so watch yourself and bring help if you can.

Stows out.

headhunters_EliminateAll_XenoThreat_H_de.en:
One of our people stumbled across a group of XenoThreat hiding out over near [LOCATION]. Not sure if they're dug in or just passing through, but we want to hit them before they move.

Maybe bring some people if you got 'em because XenoThreat don't tend to go down easy. Get there and remind them who the power is in this system.

Stows out.

headhunters_eliminateall_cfp_E_desc_001.en:
Need someone to sweep [LOCATION]. CFP security forces seized the outpost from a group of locals that'd been there for years. Beat the hell out of 'em from what I heard, so they came to Headhunters asking for revenge. 

Need it done fast and clean. 

Stows out.

TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_NonePistol.en: You need a good weapon, yes? Have one for you. Small but powerful. Like an extra spicy balalu pepper. Wikelo make this pistol look extra spicy too. You bring things I need and I do a trade.\n\nBye.

Headhunters_SecurityPatrol_S_Desc_001.en:
Got some asshole’s trying to push us out of the system. You up for pushing back?

See, there are some folks who really don’t want us here, and have started sending out hunting parties of five to seven ships, often with a bigger gun ship, to places where we’re building up our presence. Time for us to show that we’re here to stay.  

I’ve strung together a few spots starting at the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD where we’re seeing the most hostile encounters. Need you to visit each one and scan to see if we can bait them into a fight.

Know this is going to be a hard one, so don't be cocky and try to go it alone. If I were you, I'd bring at least <EM4>three friends</EM4> onboard for support. To make it worth your while, I'm promising a bonus of <EM4>16 Council Scrip</EM4> to the main contractor that pulls it off. 

- Stows

EckhartSecurity_DestroyServers_FacilityD.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Destroy Server
APPROVAL CODE = VS-14

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Our client has requested the immediate destruction of a group of servers located at a long-shuttered ASD research site. The servers in question contain information that our client considers extremely damaging and is eager to see the data completely eliminated.

Initial surveillance indicates the servers are within the facility’s <EM4>Energy Lab, located in the Research wing</EM4>. We’ve also picked up on a number of hostile forces, so be on alert.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

RepairOxygenKiosk_DescriptionLong.en:
Hello Guests,

We have recently been alerted that one of our Oxygen Dispensers has suffered a technical error. As you know these kiosks are vital to ensure that you have plenty of oxygen handy while participating in our Work Release Program.

We are looking for any available guest to reset the kiosk. That should reconnect the kiosk to the network and resolve the issue. The first guest who's able to complete this task will not only be compensated with merits, but also with the satisfaction that they're making the workplace safer for other guests.

Thank you.

Highpoint_KillAnimals_MultiType_H_desc.en:
Native plants and animals near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> are on the verge of environmental collapse due to the dramatic population spikes of several invasive species. We’ve been contracted to dramatically reduce the current population of these species to help avoid an environmental collapse. We need a dedicated and highly skilled exterminator to carry out this contract.     

You can better acquaint yourself with the creatures in question by referencing <EM4>"The Guide to Stanton Wildlife"</EM4> in your Journal.     

Best,

Wanda Werkheiser
Contract Manager
Highpoint Wilderness Specialists

CFP_Delivery_Outpost_desc_001.en:
Hey,

We’ve got an opportunity for any haulers interested in lending a hand or two to Citizens for Prosperity.

There’s a box that needs to be moved from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Shouldn’t take long, if you’re around the outpost and available. 

Also, to make your life easier, I'd make sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

CFP_Delivery_Outpost_Multi_desc_001.en:
Hi,

Citizens for Prosperity needs help moving supplies around one of our outposts. The boxes need to be picked up from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and taken to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. 

Doesn’t sound too difficult, does it? Just make sure you’re wearing a comfy pair of shoes. Also, to make your life easier, I'd bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

CFP_RecoverCargo_Easy_Description.en:
Life is tough on the frontier, and every delivery to our settlers is important. We really can't afford to lose any more this year.

One of our key suppliers has been hit by a group of outlaws over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and gone silent on us. I fear the worst, but if we can still recover the supplies they were transporting, it could make a huge difference.

Chances are the outlaws who attacked them are still lurking around there so be on your guard. Once you've dealt with them, grab the cargo and take it to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Make sure you're flying a ship that can carry <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4> and bring a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> too.

Fly safe out there,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

Foxwell_X2_ShipWaves_Desc.en:
Multiple reports are coming in of XenoThreat ships massing at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>
We're looking for contractors ready to take the fight to them. 

They want us to believe that they have right on their side. They want us to believe that they have overwhelming force. This is a chance to show them we know better.

I won't lie, this is more than just a simple security contract to me. I really hate those intolerant assholes and everything they stand for.

You with me?

Kevin Walton
Dispatcher, Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

RAIN_intro_desc_01.en:
To all available contractors,

Rayari Incorporated is looking for independent contractors to provide additional support in our efforts to push the boundaries of science, agriculture, and medicine in the Empire and beyond. 

A research initiative at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> is in desperate need of resources, so we are looking for a reliable contractor to obtain and deliver these crucial components.

For more information on the animals in question, refer to "The Guide to Stanton Wildlife" in your Journal.

Rayari offers competitive wages along with the knowledge that you're building a better universe.

Let’s grow together,

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing
RAIN_intro_desc_01.tr:
To all available contractors,

Rayari Incorporated is looking for independent contractors to provide additional support in our efforts to push the boundaries of science, agriculture, and medicine in the Empire and beyond. 

A research initiative at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> is in desperate need of resources, so we are looking for a reliable contractor to obtain and deliver these crucial components.

For more information on the animals in question, refer to "The Guide to Stanton Wildlife" in your Journal.

Rayari offers competitive wages along with the knowledge that you're building a better universe.

Let’s grow together,

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical 研究 Outsourcing

HeadHunters_RecoverCargo_Hard_Descriptio.en:
Looking for a hauler to pick up some cargo for me. Thing is, there’s a catch.

The cargo’s in the back of an abandoned ship located at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. As you may have figured, this ain’t our cargo, but it sure as hell doesn’t deserve to go to anyone else. I’ll be damned if those CFP assholes get their hands on it before we do.

Be lucky as hell if we were the first to know about this, but I’d wager there’s gonna be more ships swarming around there than flies on a kopion carcass. If you got some pals you can trust, bring them along and ghost those assholes. And don’t forget your <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> of course.

You manage to get that cargo and bring it to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>, I can get you a nice cut of the sale.

Stows out.

Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P1M2_desc.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update: 
From the personnel files recovered at the Onyx Facility, we have now learned that Dr. Jorrit has recently visited the site and accessed files while there. The next step will be to follow this lead and try to learn exactly what Dr. Jorrit was doing in his old lab.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Explore the <EM4>Engineering</EM4> wing and <EM4>access Dr. Jorrit’s recent files</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
I've found a work around for the QT issue so you'll be able to travel directly to the site from now on.

Be wary of possible hostile forces on site. 

Travel to Onyx in a vehicle that can be stored in a large hangar.

Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update: 
In going through the files, I’ve seen a couple of allusions to a specific lab sample that would potentially be useful to have our people analyze. Not sure where it is exactly, but if you hunt around Onyx Facility you should be able to find the sample and bring it to me.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Explore the <EM4>Onyx Facility Research Wing</EM4> and <EM4>track down the Lab Sample</EM4> and deliver it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Travel to Onyx in a vehicle that can be stored in a large hangar.

Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P1M1_desc.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
A client has requested that Hockrow compile a complete dossier on infamous scientist <EM4>Dr. Logan Jorrit</EM4>. Believed responsible for the incidents at Associated Science & Development’s Lazarus site, the client is eager to get a broader view of Dr. Logan and his research.

Contract Investigator Actions: 
Gain access to ASD’s shuttered <EM4>Onyx Facility</EM4> where Dr. Jorrit was formerly the Lead Scientist.  Once there, locate and <EM4>access the research lab’s personnel files</EM4> so that we can get an overview of what was going on there.

Additional Notes:
The QT beacon to the site was deactivated when the facility went dark so you'll have to fly the last leg manually.

While ASD has formally closed the facility, caution is still advised. Not only may the labs themselves be hazardous, but the surrounding area shows signs of recent visitors. Scavengers or squatters may be on site.

I've also managed to wrangle an employee ID code for you so as long as you're on the job, you'll be able to access the computers there. 

Additionally, Onyx Facility only has large hangars available, so plan your travel appropriately.

Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P2M4_desc.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update: 
The seismic data you extracted had some interesting revelations. My expert says she thinks that Jorrit might have been excavating down there. Hate to think what he’s doing, but it's our job to find out. I think we’re close to cracking this, so I want you to go back to Onyx and gather the Power Usage data. If we can track energy flow from the last couple months, a pattern should reveal itself. 

Contract Investigator Actions:
Explore the <EM4>Engineering</EM4> wing and <EM4>upload the Power Usage data</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
Be wary of possible hostile forces on site. 

Travel to Onyx in a vehicle that can be stored in a large hangar.

Once you hand off this data, I'll be sending you <EM4>10 Secure Drives</EM4> with copies of the information we've gathered so far. You can collect them at your home location.

Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P3M1_desc.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update: 
All your digging around Onyx has paid off. I’ve been able to confirm that Jorrit has been operating an off-the-record lab in the facility’s Site-B in order to conduct an experiment he calls “Project Hyperion.” I’ll send his <EM4>lab notes to your mobiGlas journal</EM4> once you’re underway, but the long and short of it is the bastard is trying to make Humans evolve or some nonsense like that.

The client wants the experimental data, so you’re going back to Onyx and do everything needed to get Project Hyperion up and running. 

Contract Investigator Actions:
Prep the experiment by collecting a <EM4>Reagent code from the Engineering wing</EM4> and a <EM4>Catalyst code from the Research wing</EM4>.

Once you have those, head down to the <EM4>Lab in Site-B</EM4> and <EM4>run the experiment</EM4> so you can <EM4>upload the results</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
Since this is an active lab, there might be ASD security on-site.
 
Travel to Onyx in a vehicle that can be stored in a large hangar.

Hockrow_FacilityDelve_P2M1_desc.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #JD10285
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Update: 
Reviewing Dr. Jorrit’s recent files that you uploaded to me left us with more questions than answers. While we know for a fact that the doctor had been inside Onyx, we don’t yet know the specifics of what he was doing. The client is eager for us to learn more about what exactly Jorrit’s up to, so I’m afraid you’re going to have to go back in.

I have a few ideas on how we might be able to use the facility’s systems to pinpoint Dr. Jorrit’s activities, though you’ll have to physically bring me the data this time so we can properly analyze it. First up, are the energy sensors in Engineering. They’re still active and sensitive enough to pick up any anomalous readings.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Explore the <EM4>Engineering</EM4> wing and <EM4>retrieve the Energy Anomaly data</EM4> and deliver it to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Additional Notes:
Be wary of possible hostile forces on site. 

Travel to Onyx in a vehicle that can be stored in a large hangar.

Case Update: 
Thanks to that last batch of data you delivered, we’re starting to fill in the gaps on what Dr. Jorrit’s doing down there. Got a rough timeline of his activities. Seems he’s had more stuff coming into Onyx than going out which is interesting. We’re going to need more intel though. There’s an old experiment running down there that monitors minute seismic changes. If you can deliver that data to me, it’ll help us pinpoint some of the movement around the facility.

BHG_Certification_Hard_Desc.en:
--------------------------------------------------------
----------------- BOUNTY CONTRACT -----------------
--------------------------------------------------------

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
PROCESSING & DISTRIBUTION

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: [TARGET] 
SYSTEM: [SYSTEM] 
RISK ASSESSMENT: High
LAST KNOWN LOCATION: [LOCATION]
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: <None>
NOTES: As your standing in the community continues to grow, the Bounty Hunters Guild would like to offer you the chance to earn a Journeyman Tracker License.

This license would signify that you are qualified to track and apprehend High-Risk Targets (HRT). These criminals can travel in larger multicrew ships with several escorts. The additional offensive and defensive capabilities make them difficult targets for all but the most skilled guild members.

To successfully complete this certification process, you must apprehend a HRT ranked criminal by the name of <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> last seen at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.

FTL_Courier_Stanton_Medium_Desc_001.en:
AVAILABLE FTL CONTRACT
FOR IMMEDIATE ASSIGNMENT

**CONTRACT DETAILS**
Junior-level courier needed for deliveries across the Stanton System.
Transportation must be provided by courier.
You will be <EM4>required to lift up to .25 SCU</EM4> in weight.
Couriers are responsible for the correct handling and safety of all packages charged to their care.

Good luck and good speed, courier!

RedWind_HaulCargo_SingleToMulti_desc_01.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------   

One of the folks over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> just hit me up about a pile of cargo, <EM4>4 SCU</EM4> or smaller, that needs to be hauled out to a few different spots.   

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)  
- [LOCATION 1]
- [LOCATION 2]  

I'm trusting you to set your own route here, so don't mess it up. And try to stay away from anywhere too dangerous. And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.

RedWind_HaulCargo_MultiToSingle_waste_de.en:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Got a bunch of comms this morning. Seems one of the local trash collectors' ship is busted and we're gonna be picking up the slack.

I got a bunch of trash (<EM4>32 SCU</EM4> or smaller) at a few different locations ready to be taken over to a freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)  
- [LOCATION 1]
- [LOCATION 2]
- [LOCATION 3]

And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.
RedWind_HaulCargo_MultiToSingle_waste_de.tr:
RED WIND LINEHAUL
'YOUR GOODS IN GOOD HANDS'
----------------------------

Got a bunch of comms this morning. Seems one of the local trash collectors' ship is busted and we're gonna be picking up the slack.

I got a bunch of trash (<EM4>32 SCU</EM4> or smaller) at a few different locations ready to be taken over to a freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)  
- [LOCATION 1]
- [LOCATION 2]
- [LOCATION 3]

And don't forget to pack a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to bring along.

HeadHunters_DefendEntitesAndEscort_VE_De.en:
I won't bore you with the nitty gritty, but trust me when I say that <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> is important to the Headhunters. So imagine how pissed I am to learn that they're being harassed by some aggressive upstarts who are hellbent on taking out their <EM>[OBJECTS]</EM4>. It won't stand.   

Get there and provide some protection before everything gets destroyed, including <EM4>any friendly ships</EM4> in the area. Nullbrains like these hopefully won't pose too much of a challenge to a rising star like yourself.

Clear ‘em all out I’ll throw <EM4>2 Council Scrip</EM4> to whoever accepted this gig.

- Stows

Foxwell_DestroyNarcotics_E_desc_001.en:
Some folks will do anything for a few creds. There’s a group of upstart outlaws over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> that have decided to start manufacturing drugs. Turns out they’re not too good at it, or maybe a little too good. The junk they’re pumping out is stronger than the normal stuff and a real danger to anyone who uses it. 

We’ve been hired to knock out their operation and destroy whatever drugs stashes are on site. Armed guards are protecting the place, but they don’t seem too skilled. Our surveillance teams observed one of them almost shoot himself in the foot. Can’t say for certain, but odds are they won’t give a pro like you too many problems.  

Marcus Clenn
Foxwell Enforcement
'Security, Your Way'

Foxwell Enforcement is a bonded security specialist licensed to operate throughout the UEE. We are always looking for new operators to join our family. If you or anyone you know is interested, please reach out to one of our contract representatives.

Covalex_RecoverCargo_Hard_Description.en:
Hi, it's El.

Need a hauler for a job ASAP. One of our contractors had a "personal emergency" and had to ditch their ship and it seems like they're not coming back. Not ideal, really.

Good news is the cargo is still intact, at least according to the tracker. It'd be a huge win for me if you could finish the job by grabbing the cargo at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and bringing it to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Seems like this was a pretty big one, you'll need a ship that can transport <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to move it all. Really appreciate your help.

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' 

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

headhunters_maintenance_local_M_desc_001.en:
Sending a call out to anyone nearby. Got a pretty heavy work order for one of our outposts at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Sounds like we need <EM4>six fuses</EM4> fixed. You'll also need a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4> with <EM4>enough RMC to patch up about five pipes</EM4> to stop the place from falling apart.

If you bring all the shit needed to patch them up, we'll pay you out.

Hopefully you know what you're doing, but just in case, the <EM4>“Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal might be worth a look.

Stows out.

headhunters_maintenance_local_H_desc_001.en:
Down at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, the place got utterly smashed in a storm and needs some serious patchwork.

If anyone out there has a <EM4>bunch of fuses</EM4> (I hear <EM4>six</EM4> should be plenty), a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4>, and <EM4>enough RMC cans to deal with eight or so messed up pipes</EM4>, we'll hook you up with some creds to do the fix.

Hopefully you know what you're doing, but just in case, the <EM4>“Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal might be worth a look.

Stows out.

Eckhart_ShipAmbush_M_desc.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Ship Ambush
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

Need someone to take out a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> and deal with the escort ships protecting it. They’ve already interfered with several of our ongoing operations and have become a real problem across several of Eckhart Security cases. Not sure what their endgame is, but it won’t matter once you deal with them.

We’ve let slip that we will be working a job over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> which should serve as bait to draw them out. The spot is ideal for an ambush because of the <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> that’s a perfect place to power down and hide until you’re ready to strike. If you’re available, the <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> and its escorts should be passing through soon.   

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract. The main contractor will also receive a bonus payment of <EM4>5 MG Scrip</EM4>.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

LingFamily_HaulCargo_AToB_desc_Party_Tim.en:
Hi, 

Guess the folks at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> are planning a party and need help acquiring everything in a timely manner. You’ll need to make multiple pick-ups for this one, including one in Nyx to grab some Jynx gin. Not sure if you’ve ever had the stuff, but it’s a Nyx specialty. Some folks can’t get past that it glows pink, but I love it. Got a truly unique kick to it.

Here are the pick ups:  

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER) 

[MULTITOSINGLETOKEN]     

Please remember to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>, as you’ll be handling cargo containers up to <EM4>8 SCU</EM4>.  

  
Happy Hauling,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator 
Ling Family Hauling

Ling Family Hauling knows it’s a dangerous and unpredictable universe and has established several protocols to protect both you and our client’s cargo. To ensure you aren’t punished for circumstances outside of your control, total payment will be prorated to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered. A delivery timer will be set for each haul. Any cargo that remains undelivered upon its expiration will be flagged as stolen and treated as such. All pick-ups and deliveries must be autoloaded or done at a freight elevator.

LingFamily_HaulCargo_AToB_desc_Fruit_Tim.en:
Hi, 
 
Normally Reyes schedules our hauls, but she’s gone for the day, and I just got a comm inquiring about a simple, direct run from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. The cargo is a load of fruit that will lose its value if it spoils. We don't want to anger this client, so would appreciate it if you knocked this out in a timely manner.  

Here’s some other details you should know. The largest container used is <EM4>2 SCU</EM4>, so don’t forget your <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>. 

 
Sincerely,  
Petra Ling  
Managing Director of Cargo Operations

LingFamily_HaulCargo_MultiToSingle_desc_.en:
Hey, 
 
Any chance you’d be willing to do a haul into Pyro? I know it can get dangerous there but this is for a good cause. A group of new CFP members have moved to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and had a tough time adjusting to life in the system. They all left stuff behind in Stanton, because their transporter didn’t have room, so we’ve been hired to pick it all up and bring it to them.      

Here are the pick ups:   

PICK UP LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER)   

- [LOCATION 1]
- [LOCATION 2]
- [LOCATION 3]
- [LOCATION 4] 

CFP leaders hope that bringing them this stuff will make the system feel more like home. Let’s make sure this one goes down smoothly. Remember to equip your <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>, and a ship that can fit <EM4>2 SCU cargo containers</EM4>. 
 

Happy Hauling,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator

LingFamily_RecoverCargo_Easy_Description.en:
Hello,

Looking for a quick job? Got a client who's waiting on a shipment but our hauler ran into some engine trouble. Can't seem to get them up and running so we need someone to take over.

Fly out to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and you'll spot their ship. You can't miss it - it's the one that's sitting still in the middle of space. Make sure you bring a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> along with a decent ship that can carry <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4>.

Once you've picked up the goods take them to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Thanks,  
Reyes Ling 
Cargo Logistics Coordinator

Headhunters_Delivery_Outpost_Multi_desc_.en:
Got a bunch of boxes sitting at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> that have to be moved to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Seems easy enough, right? Well, guess it ain’t. 

The idiot who was supposed to move these things threw out his back trying to carry all of ‘em at once. So, you know, maybe bring a <EM4> handheld tractor beam</EM4> and try taking ‘em one at a time like a normal person. But, hey, don’t let me tell you how to do your job. Just get it done. 

Stows out.

Hockrow_searchbody_space_H_Desc_001.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP65817
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
A client has hired the agency to look for a missing friend who has not been returning their comms and have been acting increasingly erratic. The client has shared all the information they possess on <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> and we’ve been able to pinpoint their ship’s location.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Travel to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and verify the status of <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>. If they are deceased, examine their body and we will pass the information on to the client.

Additional Notes:
Our scout reported heavy outlaw activity in the vicinity and was forced to retreat, meaning we have designated this as a highly dangerous case.

Hockcrow_SearchBody_VeryEasy_Description.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP51643
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
Looking for an operative to confirm the status of a client. They and their partner missed a scheduled meeting and all attempts to contact them have proven in vain. Last we heard they were undertaking some business in [SYSTEM] and fear that they may be the victim of some unfortunate tragedy.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Locate <EM4>[MISSINGPERSONLIST]</EM4> at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and confirm their status. 

If they are deceased, examine the body closely so we can verify their death via your mobiGlas.

Additional Notes:
Be cautious while conducting your search. If the client did meet harm, it would be unfortunate for you to meet the same fate.

Hockcrow_SearchBody_VeryHard_Description.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP12854
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary:
We have been asked to track down two contractors who work for a client of ours after they lost contact with them. They were last known to be traveling together in [SYSTEM]. Until their exact situation can be assessed, our client is stuck in a waiting pattern.

searchbodyspace_desc_M.en:
Whilst we pride ourselves on our efficiency and general cleanliness when it comes to our work, sometimes our contractors can get a little carried away themselves. Circumstances surrounding a former contractor’s death, and more importantly, the target, are somewhat unclear to us.

We’ll need you to travel to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and locate <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>’s body so we can deliver clear confirmation to our client. As for the former contractor… you needn’t concern yourself with them. Arrangements for disposal have already been made.

Sincerely,

Vaughn

Hockrow_searchbody_space_M_Desc_001.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP58235
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
Our client has reported a friend of hers has gone missing. They’d apparently racked up a substantial debt with a group of outlaws and the client is worried for their safety.

Contract Investigator Actions:
We’ve received word that <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>’s ship was last seen at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> looking heavily damaged. Head to the location and investigate their ship. If you can find their body, verify their status and we can drop back to the client.

Additional Notes:
Consider the missing person’s association with outlaws, we advise you to exhibit caution during this investigation.

searchbodyspace_desc_VE.en:
Despite having given the client my word that their target has been dealt with, they are disposed to bouts of paranoia, so they require additional digital evidence of their demise.

I’ll need you to head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and give the corpse a thorough once over. Whilst I’m confident <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> is taken care of, verification via your mobiGlas will hopefully bring some peace of mind to my client.

I can’t imagine you coming across any significant trouble, but in this line of work, some trouble is always to be expected.

Sincerely,

Vaughn

Hockrow_searchbody_space_VH_Desc_001.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP66432
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
Need a skilled operator with combat experience to investigate the last known location of <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>. Their employer hired us to look for they as they were carrying some highly valuable cargo, but the trackers have been disabled and the pilot is no longer responding.

We suspect that outlaws have attacked the ship and seized the cargo for themselves. The client has expressed that they consider the cargo lost but would like to know if the pilot is dead so they can inform their family. 

Contract Investigator Actions:
Investigate <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and locate the <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>’s ship. If you are able to find the pilot’s body, confirm their status so we may inform the client.

Additional Notes:
Backup is highly recommended for this encounter.

Covalex_Delivery_Stanton_Hard_Desc_001.en:
Hi,

Need a reliable contractor to pick up some packages for us and deliver them to their destination.

This route is a longer one so make sure you have enough fuel and don't forget a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4>.

And not sure what you were planning on flying, but you'll need a ship that can transport <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4>

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,

Ella Tieno
Jr. Logistics Coordinator
Covalex Shipping
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

headhunters_defendship_multi_SRT_PA_desc.en:
Got ourselves in a real mess here. A Headhunters ship on an important mission got attacked near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Can’t get too into the specifics but it’s absolutely vital that they survive. The People’s Alliance know this too because they’re throwing everything they can at ‘em.

Not gonna pull any punches. This is a serious-ass situation that many wouldn’t survive. If you do, I’ll sing your praises and make sure you’re paid well.   

-Stows

headhunters_eliminateall_cfp_desc_001.en:
Here's the deal. Some of those mercs that CFP hired as security went and shot up some Headhunters that were just moving through the system. They weren't even doing anything, just flying.

Anyway, we tracked them back to [LOCATION] and want to dish out some payback. Grab your gear and be our weapon, we'll make it worth your while.

- Stows

Headhunters_SecurityPatrol_H_Desc_001.en:
I’ve noticed an uptick in attacks on Headhunter ships and it's got me feelin' jumpy. Got an important resupply shipment that we can’t afford to lose, and need help determining what route to send it. I’ve strung together a few potential spots that I’d set up in if I was gonna hit ‘em. Any chance you could visit and clear out any lowlifes that may be hiding there? 

The route starts at the <EM4>location marker</EM4> on your HUD. After you scan it and clear whatever’s there, I’ll send you to a few other areas that could work. I’ve been hearing people have been rolling through these spots, so would be smart to <EM4>bring a friend</EM4> to watch your back.

You make it to the end and I'll give the main contractor a bonus <EM4>14 Council Scrip</EM4> as thanks. 

- Stows

DeadSaints_RecoverCargo_Super_Descriptio.en:
A rival crew was able to get their hands on our delivery routes and now they have one of my cargo ships pinned down at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.

Now the ship’s sitting there being guarded by a full crew of these assholes. They must be waiting for someone to show up with a transport ship, but you’re going to get there first.

Head there with a crew of your own and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> to take the goods away. Make sure they’re the best people you got. It’d be a mistake to underestimate these bastards.

Ghost them and bring my cargo back to the freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and I’ll make sure you’re seriously comp’d for this.

-Twitch

EckhartSecurity_RecoverCargo_VeryEasy_De.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Recover Cargo
Approval code: = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

One of my clients was in the process of transporting some cargo when they came under fire from a group of outlaws. We haven't been able to contact the crew onboard, but trackers indicate the cargo remains intact.

We need a contractor to head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, recover the cargo, and deliver it to the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. A ship that can store <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4> and a <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> are essential for this. Presently, we're not detecting any hostiles, but that could change by the time you've arrived.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

Shubin_Industrial_HandMining_Pyro_H_Plan.en:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>[SYSTEM] </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

[LOCATION] 

Reminder, since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>[MULTITOOL]</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

LocalDelivery_desc.en:
Happy Luminalia!

I have a huge favor to ask. Thanks to some very ill timed maintenance issues, my ship is out of commission for at least a week and I won't be able to finish delivering presents to everyone on my gift list.

Looked into using FTL but with their holiday pricing I'll end up paying more credits than what the gifts cost! 

Figured I would see if you're interested in helping me out. I get my gifts delivered on time and you get some extra Luminalia spending credits. 

The gifts are wrapped and waiting at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. [DESCRIPTIONSETUP].

Thanks in advance and may your light glow a little brighter this year!

Sincerely,
[GIFTSENDER]

civilian_localdelivery_holiday_desc_002.en:
I'm in desperate need of a little Luminalia magic and I hope you're the one to help.

There are some gifts stuck at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> that need to be delivered. 

I tried scheduling a pick up but just got notified that they won't be able to make it until after the holidays. Would you be able to take care of the deliveries for me? I'll gladly pay you what I was going to give them.

It shouldn't be too hard.[DESCRIPTIONSETUP].

Whatever you decide to help or not, I hope you have a very happy holiday!

- [GIFTSENDER]

civilian_localdelivery_holiday_desc_003.en:
Hope the holiday season is treating you well.

Mine's been a bit stressful so far. It turns out that I put the wrong delivery address on a handful of gifts and I'm desperately seeking a way to get them delivered on time. 

It would mean so much to me if you could get me out of this jam. 

The presents are at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and will need to be delivered to [DESCRIPTIONSETUP]

Thank you and best holiday wishes,
[GIFTSENDER]

UDM_LocalDelivery_desc.en:
Happy Luminalia!

I have a huge favor to ask. Thanks to some very ill timed maintenance issues, my ship is out of commission for at least a week and I won't be able to finish delivering presents to everyone on my gift list.

Looked into using FTL but with their holiday pricing I'll end up paying more credits than what the gifts cost! 

Figured I would see if you're interested in helping me out. I get my gifts delivered on time and you get some extra Luminalia spending credits. 

The gifts are wrapped and waiting at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. [DESCRIPTIONSETUP].

Thanks in advance and may your light glow a little brighter this year!

Sincerely,
[GIFTSENDER]

TheCollector_Recipes_Desc_AtlsPew.en:
Hello. Know you human like strange metal suit. How about metal suit with ikti? Sorry, ikti is Banu word, you call it 'gun.' 

If want, bring things I say and I will make for you. Gun will shoot. Cause many damage.

Bye.

Wikelo had exciting idea during brief work rest. Was thinking about the little glow worms in Pyro and saw armor get changed to look like.

Bye.

Covalex_HaulCargo_AtoB_desc_ToRuinStatio.en:
Hiya, 

Looking for a hauler willing to make a run to Ruin Station. Know hauls to Pyro can give some people pause, but this is one we do regularly to help supply the station. I’ve also confirmed that everything on the cargo manifest is above board. 

If you’re interested, the cargo is ready for pick up at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.  Make sure you bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> and a ship that can hold <EM4>24 SCU cargo containers</EM4> otherwise it might be a little rough.

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' 

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

Covalex_HaulCargo_AtoB_desc_DeliverAll.en:
Hiya, 

Here’s the deal, I need someone good for a special run. We’ve got an important client that’s threatening to take their business elsewhere, because their deliveries are consistently missing cargo. They’re demanding that 100% of the cargo be delivered on this run, or they won’t pay. Since this was before my time and my supervisor wants to show that it won’t happen again, they agreed with this. Anyway, I think you might be a good fit. 

If you’re willing to take that risk too, here are all the pertinent details. The cargo can be collected from <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and delivered to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>. Looks like the largest cargo container you’ll need to handle is <EM4>24 SCU</EM4>, so be sure to bring a ship big enough and a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> to help you move those containers around.  
 
Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service, 

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.'

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

Covalex_HaulCargo_SingleToMulti_desc_ToC.en:
Hi, 

Several Citizens for Prosperity outposts in Pyro need supplies. It seems like we regularly do runs like this for them, but this one looks like it might be a bit riskier. A CFP rep let me know that outlaw activity around these sites has spiked recently, but they desperately need these outposts restocked, so we’re going ahead with the delivery. <EM4>Just a head’s up that you could run into trouble, so come prepared</EM4>.       

All the cargo’s waiting at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and here’s where it’s heading:  

DROP OFF LOCATIONS (ANY ORDER) 

[SINGLETOMULTITOKEN]  

According to the manifest, the largest cargo container you’ll need to deal with is <EM4>16 SCU</EM4>. Aside from that, remember to bring a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> along.    

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service, 
  
Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator

BHG_Certification_Super_Desc.en:
--------------------------------------------------------
----------------- BOUNTY CONTRACT -----------------
--------------------------------------------------------

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
PROCESSING & DISTRIBUTION

The Bounty Hunters Guild has authorized an official bounty.

NAME: [TARGET] 
SYSTEM: [SYSTEM] 
RISK ASSESSMENT: Extreme
LAST KNOWN LOCATION: [LOCATION]
KNOWN AFFILIATIONS: <None>
NOTES: As acknowledgment of your expertise in the craft, the Bounty Hunters Guild would like to offer you the chance to earn a Master Tracker License.

This license would signify that you are qualified to track and apprehend Extreme-Risk Targets (ERT). These are criminals who travel in sub-capital ships with heavy escorts. This class of bounty only gets assigned to the most experienced of trackers.

To successfully complete this certification process, you must apprehend an ERT ranked criminal by the name of <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> last seen at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.

BOUNTY HUNTERS GUILD
In Pursuit of Justice

The Bounty Hunters Guild is a security service sanctioned by the Mercenary Guild and authorized to operate in both the UEE and beyond in accordance with Xenotrade Authority Acts.

Covalex_RecoverCargo_Medium_Description.en:
Hey El here,

Got a weird one for you. I was checking the delivery stats for the past week and noticed some discrepancies. Seems we have a couple of deliveries marked as fulfilled but the cargo trackers are still showing as active.

One of these is located at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> so I was hoping you could fly over and get to the bottom of this. The order says the hauler was using a ship that could carry <EM4>[MAX_SCU] cargo containers</EM4> so make sure you have the same. A <EM4>heavy-duty tractor beam</EM4> is a must for this one too.

That cargo needs to be delivered yesterday, so as soon as you've got it take it to a freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> and I'll get your payment sorted for you.

Thanks in advance for ensuring prompt service,

Ella Tieno 
Jr. Logistics Coordinator 
Covalex Shipping   
'Anything you need, anywhere you need it.' 

Covalex Shipping is a limited liability corporation. To encourage timely deliveries and prevent fraud on cargo hauls, Covalex Shipping will set a delivery time limit and upon expiration, any undelivered cargo will be considered stolen and treated as such. Total payment will be prorated according to the percentage of cargo successfully delivered.

Shubin_Industrial_HandMining_Pyro_M_Disc.en:
POSTING: Purchase Order
LOCATION: <EM4>[SYSTEM] </EM4>

TERMS*: 
Shubin Interstellar is currently looking to fulfil another purchase order for a variety of materials. We appreciate your help in this matter.

[LOCATION] For a comprehensive list of where to find these minerals, consult <EM4>Mining Fundamentals #2: Where to Mine</EM4> in your mobiGlas Journal.

Since this is a purchase order and not a mining contract, you are expected to provide your own equipment, such as a <EM4>[MULTITOOL]</EM4>.

Once you’re ready to sell us the required materials, deposit them in the freight elevator located at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

*By accepting this contract you are assuming any and all risks associated with the work outlined herein and in no way can Shubin Interstellar be held accountable for any damages accrued during the duration of the contract.

cfp_maintenance_E_desc_001.en:
Hi,

One of our outposts at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> is in need of some light repairs. The folks onsite have estimated that you’ll need <EM4>three fuses</EM4>, a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4>, and <EM4>enough RMC canisters to fix up to three or so pipes.</EM4>

If you need more information on maintenance work, see <EM4>“Cornerstone Developments' Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> entry in your mobiGlas Journal.

Thanks again for your help,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

cfp_maintenance_local_E_desc_001.en:
A nearby outpost of ours at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> is suffering from some mechanical failures and could use repairing. Our usual technician is off on another job so we're looking to hire an outside contractor.

We will need <EM4>three fuses replaced</EM4> and if you could bring a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4> with <EM4>enough canisters of RMC to fix around three pipes</EM4> that should take care of the rest.

If you need more information on maintenance work, see <EM4>“Cornerstone Developments' Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> entry in your mobiGlas Journal.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

cfp_maintenance_M_desc_001.en:
Hello,

We've received word that a devastating storm hit <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> which caused some damage to the structures. Our technician on site is still trying to figure out what they can fix but they can’t get everything. If you bring <EM4>six fuses</EM4>, a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4>, and <EM4>enough RMC canisters to repair around five pipes</EM4>, we should be able to handle any remaining repairs.

If you need more information on maintenance work, see <EM4>“Cornerstone Developments' Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> entry in your mobiGlas Journal.

Thanks,

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

cfp_maintenance_local_M_desc_001.en:
If you happen to be in the area, please read this.

Citizens for Prosperity is looking for a qualified mechanic to head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> with the required supplies and perform some repairs.

As it stands, you’ll need <EM4>six fuses</EM4>, a <EM4>salvaging tool</EM4>, and <EM4>enough RMC canisters to repair five pipes or so.</EM4> That should help us get the outpost functional again. We'll compensate you for your time and materials.

If you need more information on maintenance work, see <EM4>“Cornerstone Developments' Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> entry in your mobiGlas Journal.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

If you need more information on maintenance work, see <EM4>“Cornerstone Developments' Guide to Maintenance”</EM4> entry in your mobiGlas Journal.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

TheCollector_Ships_Starlift_Max_Desc.en: If you want to move many things. Hercules ship, very good for that. Wikelo even know souli back in Protectorate that started to use. Very big. Wikelo can give you similar version if you get what Wikelo need. Look at list and tell me.

TheCollector_Ships_Wolf_Unique_Desc.en: You have been good trade partner for Wikelo. Offer you this very special Wolf mod. Make trade even better - Bring me what I want and I give you the special Wolf AND Antium Armor AND a VOLT LMG. Very good deal for my very good customer.

vaughn_searchbody_space_M_Desc_001.en:
Whilst we pride ourselves on our efficiency and general cleanliness when it comes to our work, sometimes our contractors can get a little carried away themselves. Circumstances surrounding a former contractor’s death, and more importantly, the target, are somewhat unclear to us.

We’ll need you to travel to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and locate <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>’s body so we can deliver clear confirmation to our client. As for the former contractor… you needn’t concern yourself with them. Arrangements for disposal have already been made.

Sincerely,

Vaughn

Heard they're posted over at [LOCATION]. Swing by and take them out. Try not to cause too much damage. They're the target, not anyone else.

Stows out.

They've been on the run, so they're gonna be skittish. I'd approach with caution.

Stows out.

cfp_HaulCargo_RegionLink_desc_001.en:
Hi, we need to move some cargo across the system and were wondering if you could help. I know this is outside your usual purview, but I'm low on options. This would also be a great way to show your committed to Citizens for Prosperity's greater mission here.

If you head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, there should be some cargo accessible via a freight elevator that we'll need you to take to another freight elevator at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Only thing to call out is that your ship must be able to handle <EM4>4 SCU cargo containers</EM4>. To make your life easier, be sure you have a <EM4>handheld tractor beam</EM4> with you. Otherwise, it should be a simple run. 

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

headhunters_eliminateall_base_Generic_E_.en:
So here's the deal, we got some small time dirtbags who think they're hotshots running out of a base near [LOCATION]. I don't know what toxic shit they're drinking but they thought it'd be a good idea to step to some Headhunter Clips. Killed one, injured three more. So I'm looking to send someone there to blast their ambition right out of their skulls.

Head over and get it done. You'll get a nice bump of creds for it.

- Stows

cfp_ChainElimAll_3C_ElimSpec_GenAttack_M.en:
The outlaw presence here has become much bolder of late and a lot of people are getting hurt. We've recently lost several clusters around [LOCATION]. While we don't like to have to resort to violence, the board has acknowledged that these locations are crucial to establishing stability in the system and authorized the use of a security detail to retake them.

We're also aware that the embedded hostiles are being led by [TARGET] who's had a history of attacking CFP interests. The board would like [TARGET] dealt with to prevent future attacks.

Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

RAIN_collectresources_single_OLP_desc_01.en:
To all available contractors,

Our research team at at <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4> is working tirelessly on solving the current ‘Regen Crisis’ and addressing the issue of unstable imprints. Their work has produced promising results, but a lack of a key resource is impeding their ability to run further experiments. 

We’ve received word from our supplier that increased demand combined with lower mining yields means that we won’t receive our scheduled shipment for another few months. Our research team can’t wait that long, and we’re hoping you can help.      

The resource is hard to come by, but we have it on good authority that the old Hathor mining facilities were built in areas with a high concentration of the ore. Since Hathor went defunct not long after establishing their operations in- system, there’s a good chance that activating one of these mining lasers could provide you with what we need.

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing

CFP_ShipWaveAttack_ClearHostiles_Desc_H_.en:
A criminal fleet has taken up root in a sector that Citizens For Prosperity is trying to develop and all forward progress has stopped thanks to their violent actions. It is imperative to a long term goals that we find a way to neutralize this fleet before that cause any further damage.

You and your most trusted support ships will head to [LOCATION] and neutralize any hostiles you find laying in wait there. They have been known to operate in smaller packs, so it's vital that you wait until all of the hostiles have been dealt with.

Your assistance is much appreciated,
Lima Endicott
Lead Dispatcher
Citizens for Prosperity

Intersec_KillShip_Desc_Medium_001.en:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: Seemingly unsatisfied with their takings in Nyx, an outlaw group lead by <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> has been planning a major strike against the UEE. This cannot be allowed to come to pass.

Thanks to the work of our Intelligence team, we've been able to track them down to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>.

Head there as soon as you can and engage before they have a chance to leave the system. Based on our strategic analysis, we recommend a <EM4>well-armed and skilled fleet</EM4> will be necessary for the successful completion of this mission.

Respectfully, 

Deacon Tobin 
Operations Manager 
InterSec Defense Solutions  

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.

Intersec_KillShip_Vanduul_Desc_VeryHard_.en:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Vanduul
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: InterSec is in need of a highly skilled combat pilot who can locate and neutralize a dangerous Vanduul target.

An operator of ours has identified a Vanduul ship flying within the vicinity of <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. We've been given strict instructions to eliminate any Vanduul spotted on the fringes of UEE space, for fear of encroachment into the Empire's territory.

Bring a <EM4>small fleet of competent pilots</EM4> with you to engage and neutralize the target.

Respectfully, 

Deacon Tobin 
Operations Manager 
InterSec Defense Solutions  

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.

Intersec_KillShip_Desc_Intro_001.en:
MISSION SPECS

Area of Operation: Nyx System
Hostile Forces: Outlaws
Equipment Specs: Combat-rated Ships
Briefing: InterSec has been hired to combat the rising number of outlaws using Nyx as a staging ground for their operations, with the intention of attacking neighboring UEE systems.

As a preventative measure, we require you to travel to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> and eliminate the ringleader <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> to deter their planned attack on Stanton. They and their crew are highly dangerous and you are <EM4>advised  to bring a wingman</EM4> for support.

Contractors who can prove themselves reliable and competent in executing operations will be eligible for future missions with InterSec.

Respectfully,

Deacon Tobin
Operations Manager
InterSec Defense Solutions

This communication consists of a non-binding offer that upon acceptance may be immediately terminated by either party without any given notice. All operations are conducted at the contractor’s own personal risk and must adhere to system law where applicable.

searchbodyspace_desc_intro.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP38100
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
Hockrow Agency is looking for new contractors with a strong stomach and familiarity with dangerous situations to handle the legwork of an active missing persons investigation. 

Reports indicate that it is highly unlikely that you will encounter any hostiles.

Contract Investigator Actions:
Travel to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>, search for <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>, and confirm their status. If they are deceased, examine the body closely so we can verify their death via your mobiGlas.

Additional Notes:
Successful completion of this task will open up other employment opportunities within Hockrow Agency.

Eckhart_ShipAmbush_Intro_desc.en:
ECKHART SECURITY, LLC.
CONTRACTS & DISPATCH

CONTRACT TYPE: Ship Ambush
APPROVAL CODE = [APPROVAL_CODE]

FOR IMMEDIATE PROCESSING

We’re looking for contractors with combat experience who are willing to get their hands dirty so to speak. A client of ours was double-crossed by a <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> and we’ve been waiting for an opportunity to deal with the issue. After tracking them for several weeks, we’ve identified <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> as the ideal spot to intercept them. It features an <EM4>emission cloud</EM4> where you can hide and power down your ship while waiting for the <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>.

Intel suggests that they may travel with an escort. If they do, you’ll have to deal with them too. Since this is your first contract, we will have other contractors in the area who can lend a hand once you strike.

Payment will be issued upon successful completion of contract. There’s a bonus payment of <EM4>1 MG Scrip</EM4> in this for the main contractor too.

This contract is non-negotiable.

This message may contain confidential, proprietary, privileged and/or private information. The information is intended to be for the use of the individual or entity designated above.

headhunters_bombingrun_E_desc_001.en:
Some competition has taken root at [LOCATION] and they've really been gumming up the works for our operations in the area.

Now part of me sees some potential in the upstarts so I'm hoping to bring them into fold, but at the same time, I can't really afford to have them flying around causing trouble.

Instead, I want you to go and blow up their fuel tanks. That should keep them grounded long enough for me to talk some sense into their thick heads.

-Stows out

searchbodyspace_desc_S.en:
Hockrow Agency 
Case File #MP70001
Lead Investigator: Arken Mallor

Case Summary: 
In need of a highly competent operator for a special assignment. A highly dangerous outlaw that has been evading local authorities for some time has been reported to have been involved in a large-scale ship battle, resulting in their supposed death. Our client wishes to confirm that they have been neutralized.

Contract Investigator Actions:
We require you to head to <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4> locate <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4>’s body and confirm their death.

Additional Notes:
Serious preparation is advised for this contract as there is a strong potential for there to be highly aggressive and dangerous hostiles still on site. Arm yourself accordingly and consider bring other skilled pilots with you.

vaughn_searchbody_space_S_Desc_001.en:
I have a very specific task that requires my best people. 

Something unusual seems to have occurred over at <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. One of our contractors seems to have gone rogue after completing their assignment, refusing to communicate with us, and indiscriminately attacking those they come across. Now, I have other methods for dealing with renegade assets but our client still requires confirmation of the original target’s death which we are unable to provide due to this pilot’s presence.

I need you to head to the location and identify that <EM4>[TARGET]</EM4> is well and truly dead, preferably without being obliterated by this former, disgruntled contractor. As a fair warning, they were one of our most thorough, and ruthless employees, so extreme caution is advised. You will want to bring your most competent of allies to support you with this. 

Sincerely,

Vaughn

TheCollector_Menu_Desc_PolarisShip.en:
Wikelo recently get many blueprints in trade with human who not very smart. Now can make very big ship. 

Not cheap and need many pieces but will make. If you want, go quick, this cost much to Wikelo so won't be able to do for long but I like new Human system so I want to thank you all for welcome.

Bring to <EM4>[DESTINATIONS]</EM4> if want.

Bye.

TheCollector_Ships_Nox_Desc.en: Wikelo know many Xi'an. Talk slow but very interesting if you have patience. This is very fast little thing to get you across planet. Wikelo made a few tweaks to make it zippier. If you want, Wikelo will make for you. Bye.

RAIN_CollectResources_storm_desc_002.en:
To all available contractors,

We at Rayari are stopping at nothing to halt the ongoing regeneration crisis, but to continue their efforts our scientists need a rare resource that the company's suppliers cannot obtain. 

Rayari is seeking an experienced contractor to gather <EM4>irradiated valakkar pearls</EM4>, which can be extracted from adult valakkar that have been extensively exposed to radiation. Our scans have found a qualifying population inside the storm near <EM4>[LOCATION]</EM4>. Because these animals are highly dangerous, Rayari is prepared to generously compensate anyone who can assist with gathering the pearls. 

Once attained, please take these valuable resources to <EM4>[DESTINATION]</EM4>.

Together we can make the universe better for all.

Narina Lerrem
Senior Manager
Clinical Research Outsourcing
